================================================================================
SKILL TREES — DESIGN DOCUMENT (104 CLASSES)
================================================================================
Instructions: Add your annotations on any line starting with ">>" or at the
end of each section where "[YOUR NOTES]" appears. I will read these back.

################################################################################
CLASS 1: CHRONOWEAVER (Time Mage)
################################################################################
Fantasy: You unravel the threads of time itself, speeding allies, decaying
enemies, and fracturing reality with paradoxes.

ARCHETYPE A: ACCELERANT (Speed / Haste / Tempo)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Pure speed fantasy. You act more, allies act more, enemies feel slow.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Quicken         | Buff     | Haste self for 5s, +30% action speed
  - Tempo Tap       | Passive  | Basic attacks grant 2% action speed, stacks 5x
  - Blink Step      | Movement | Short-range teleport, 8s cooldown

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Shared Haste    | Buff     | Quicken now also affects nearest ally
  - Flicker Strike  | Attack   | Teleport to target, strike, teleport back
  - Time Slip       | Passive/Evasion  | 10% chance to dodge by briefly skipping forward in time

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Overclock       | Buff/Risk     | Double action speed for 3s, then 2s self-stun
  - Cascade         | Passive  | Kills during haste extend haste by 2s
  - Blur            | Passive/Evasion  | While hasted, gain 20% evasion

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Temporal Surge  | Ultimate | Party-wide haste, +50% speed for 8s, 90s cooldown
  - Afterimage      | Passive  | While hasted, leave a damaging afterimage on dodge

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Infinite Loop   | Ultimate | For 6s, every action you take is repeated once for free
                    |          | 180s cooldown. Does not copy other Legendaries.

>> Your notes on Accelerant:
>>
>>


ARCHETYPE B: ENTROPY (Decay / Damage-over-Time / Erosion)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Patient destroyer. You wither enemies over time, aging armor and flesh.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Rust Touch      | Attack   | Melee hit applies Corrode: -5% armor for 6s, stacks 3x
  - Wither Bolt     | Attack   | Ranged bolt dealing low damage + Decay (DoT, 4s)
  - Sap Vitality    | Debuff   | Target heals 30% less for 8s

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Accelerate Rot  | Passive  | Your DoTs tick 25% faster
  - Frailty Aura    | Aura     | Enemies within 10m take 8% more damage from all sources
  - Dust to Dust    | Attack   | If target has 3+ DoTs, deal burst damage equal to 2 ticks

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Entropic Field  | AoE      | 8m zone: all enemies inside gain Decay, lasts 6s
  - Age of Ruin     | Passive  | Your DoTs reduce enemy healing received by 5% per stack
  - Crumble         | Attack   | Destroy 50% of target's remaining armor (30s cooldown)

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Pandemic        | Active   | All DoTs on target spread to enemies within 12m
  - Temporal Rot    | Passive  | When an enemy dies with your DoTs, nearby enemies gain
                    |          | those DoTs at half duration

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Heat Death      | Ultimate | Mark a target. For 10s, all damage they've taken from
                    |          | your DoTs is recorded, then dealt again as a single burst.
                    |          | 180s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Entropy:
>>
>>


ARCHETYPE C: PARADOX (Reality-Bending / High-Risk High-Reward)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Chaotic time wizard. Powerful but unpredictable, warping cause & effect.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Rewind          | Heal     | Restore self to HP/position from 3s ago, 20s cooldown
  - Deja Vu         | Debuff   | Target repeats their last action involuntarily
  - Stutter         | CC       | Freeze target in time for 1.5s (stun)

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Split Timeline  | Passive  | 15% chance any skill activates twice
  - Causal Loop     | Debuff   | Target takes damage equal to damage they deal for 4s
  - Echo Cast       | Active   | Repeat your last-used skill at 60% power, no cost

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Schrodinger     | Passive/Heal  | When you would die, 50% chance to instead heal to 30% HP
                    |          | Once per combat.
  - Time Bomb       | Attack   | Place a marker. After 5s, all damage dealt in the area
                    |          | during that time is repeated as AoE.
  - Fork Reality    | Summon   | Create a clone of yourself for 8s. It copies your attacks
                    |          | at 40% damage. If it dies, you take 20% of your max HP.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Grandfather     | Active   | Erase an enemy's last action (undo their last attack,
                    |          | heal, or buff). 45s cooldown.
  - Instability     | Passive  | All your skills have +20% damage but +15% variance
                    |          | (can overperform or underperform)

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Closed Timelike | Ultimate | Rewind the entire battlefield 6s. All positions, HP,
    Curve           |          | cooldowns, and buffs reset to their state 6s ago.
                    |          | Only you retain memory (keep your buffs). 300s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Paradox:
>>
>>

>

################################################################################
CLASS 2: IRONBLOOM WARDEN (Nature Tank)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A living fortress of bark, thorn, and root. You grow your own armor,
punish attackers, and sustain your team through the earth's resilience.

ARCHETYPE A: THORNWALL (Defensive / Reactive Damage)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: The immovable object. You want to be hit. Every blow grows your power.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Barkskin        | Buff/Defense     | +20% damage reduction for 6s
  - Thorn Coat      | Reactive  | Reflect 10% of melee damage taken back to attacker
  - Root Stance     | Stance   | Immobile but +30% damage reduction, +threat generation

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Ironwood        | Passive/Defense  | Barkskin now also grants +15% max HP while active
  - Briar Lash      | Reactive | When hit, 25% chance to root attacker for 2s
  - Living Fortress | Passive/Defense  | Gain +2% damage reduction per enemy targeting you (max 5)

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Splinter Burst  | Active   | Shatter your Barkskin early to deal AoE damage based on
                    |          | damage absorbed. More absorbed = more burst.
  - Petrified Bark  | Passive/Defense  | Below 30% HP, gain 50% damage reduction
  - Entangling Wall | Active   | Summon a line of thorns (8m). Enemies crossing take
                    |          | damage and are slowed 50% for 3s.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Martyrwood      | Passive  | 20% of damage dealt to nearby allies is redirected to you.
                    |          | You heal for 5% of damage redirected.
  - Thorn King      | Passive  | Thorn Coat reflection increased to 30%. Reflected damage
                    |          | now applies Bleed (DoT, 3s).

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - World Tree      | Ultimate | For 10s, you become immobile and massive. +80% damage
                    |          | reduction, all allies within 15m gain +30% DR,
                    |          | and attackers take massive thorn damage. 180s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Thornwall:
>>
>>


ARCHETYPE B: OVERGROWTH (Healing / Regeneration / Sustain)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Unkillable regenerator. You outlast everything through constant growth.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Rejuvenate      | Heal     | HoT on self or ally, heals over 8s
  - Photosynthesis  | Passive/Heal  | Regen 1% max HP per second while not taking damage
  - Seedling        | Summon   | Plant a seedling that pulses minor heals in 6m for 10s

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Deep Roots      | Passive/Defense  | Rejuvenate now also grants +10% damage reduction
  - Overgrowth      | Active   | Instantly grow all active Seedlings, doubling their radius
                    |          | and healing
  - Sap Blood       | Passive/Heal  | 15% of damage you deal heals you

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Verdant Tide    | Heal     | AoE heal-over-time in 10m radius, 8s duration
  - Regrowth        | Passive/Shield  | When your HoTs overheal, store excess as a shield (max 20% HP)
  - Symbiosis       | Passive/Heal  | While near a Seedling, gain +15% to all healing done

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Ancient Growth  | Passive/Heal  | Your HoTs can critically heal (2x) with 15% chance
  - Bloom Cascade   | Heal   | Consume all Seedlings. Each consumed heals all allies in
                    |          | its radius for a large burst. More seedlings = bigger heal.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Gaia's Embrace  | Ultimate | For 12s, the entire battlefield becomes overgrown. All
                    |          | allies regen 5% max HP/s. All enemies are slowed 30%.
                    |          | Seedlings sprout automatically every 2s. 240s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Overgrowth:
>>
>>


ARCHETYPE C: ROT HERALD (Offensive Nature / Poison / Fungal)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Nature's dark side. You weaponize decay, spores, and parasites.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Spore Shot      | Attack   | Ranged attack that applies Poison (DoT, 5s)
  - Fungal Growth   | Summon   | Plant a fungal node that poisons enemies in 5m radius
  - Toxic Skin      | Passive  | Attackers gain a stack of Poison on melee hit

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Mycelium Net    | Passive  | Fungal nodes link together. Enemies near any node are
                    |          | slowed 20%.
  - Virulent Strain | Passive  | Poison deals 30% more damage
  - Decompose       | Active   | Consume Poison stacks on target for burst damage

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Plague Garden   | Active   | Plant 3 fungal nodes in a triangle. Zone inside deals
                    |          | constant poison damage and reduces healing by 40%.
  - Parasitic Vine  | Attack   | Latch onto target. Drains HP from them to you over 6s.
                    |          | Breaks if you move too far.
  - Necrotic Bloom  | Passive  | Enemies that die while poisoned explode in a poison AoE

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Cordyceps       | Debuff   | Infect target. If they die within 10s, a fungal minion
                    |          | rises from their corpse for 15s.
  - Rot Aura        | Aura     | Enemies within 8m lose 2% max HP per second

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Spreading   | Ultimate | Select a target. A fungal infection grows on them over 8s.
                    |          | At full growth, it detonates: lethal to non-bosses, 40%
                    |          | max HP to bosses. Infection spreads to nearby enemies at
                    |          | 50% progress on detonation. 240s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Rot Herald:
>>
>>

################################################################################
CLASS 3: ECHO DANCER (Sound / Vibration Assassin)
################################################################################
Fantasy: You weaponize sound itself — precise frequencies to shatter, silence to
vanish, and overwhelming noise to break minds and matter.

ARCHETYPE A: RESONANCE (Amplification / Burst / Precision)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Surgical striker. Build frequency on a target, then shatter them.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Tuning Strike   | Attack   | Melee hit applies 1 Resonance stack to target
  - Harmonic Blade  | Passive  | Every 3rd hit on same target deals +40% damage
  - Pitch Perfect   | Passive  | +15% crit chance against targets with 3+ Resonance

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Shatter Point   | Attack   | Consume all Resonance stacks. Deal burst damage
                    |          | scaling with stacks consumed (big payoff at 5+)
  - Sympathetic Vibe| Passive  | When you apply Resonance to a target, nearby enemies
                    |          | gain 1 stack too (3m radius)
  - Overtone        | Passive/Defense  | Resonance stacks also reduce target's damage by 3% each

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Crystal Freq    | Active   | Lock onto target's Resonance frequency. For 6s, all hits
                    |          | apply 2 stacks instead of 1.
  - Feedback Loop   | Passive  | Shatter Point refunds 1 stack per enemy hit by the burst
  - Glass Cannon    | Buff/Risk  | +25% damage dealt, +15% damage taken

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Sonic Boom      | Active   | Detonate all Resonance on all nearby enemies simultaneously.
                    |          | Chain reaction: each detonation adds 1 stack to survivors.
  - Perfect Pitch   | Passive  | Shatter Point at 8+ stacks always crits and ignores 50% armor

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Requiem         | Ultimate | Mark a target. For 10s, track all damage dealt to them.
                    |          | At end, replay 60% of total damage as pure sound damage
                    |          | (ignores all defenses). 200s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Resonance:
>>
>>


ARCHETYPE B: SILENCE (Stealth / Debuff / Denial)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Ghost operative. You erase sound, erase yourself, and erase enemies'
ability to fight back.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Muffle          | Debuff   | Silence target for 2s (no abilities)
  - Sound Eater     | Stealth  | Enter stealth for 5s. Broken by attacking. 15s cooldown.
  - Dampening Field | Passive  | Reduce all sound/aggro generation by 40%

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Dead Air        | Debuff   | Create a 6m zone of silence. Enemies inside cannot cast
                    |          | abilities for 4s.
  - Ambush          | Attack   | Attacks from stealth deal +80% damage and stun for 1s
  - Whisper Step    | Passive/Movement  | Movement speed +20% while stealthed

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Anechoic        | Passive/Immunity  | While in stealth, you are immune to AoE detection
  - Void Frequency  | Debuff   | Target's cooldowns are frozen for 4s (cannot recover)
  - Ghost Note      | Active   | Leave a sound decoy at your position. Enemies target it
                    |          | for 5s. You gain stealth.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Total Silence   | Active   | 12m radius: all enemies silenced for 4s, all allies
                    |          | gain stealth for 4s. 60s cooldown.
  - Erasure         | Passive  | Kills from stealth do not break stealth. 5s internal CD.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Unheard     | Ultimate | For 15s, you exist in perfect silence. Permanent stealth
                    |          | (not broken by attacks), all attacks from stealth, +50%
                    |          | damage, enemies cannot target you directly. 240s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Silence:
>>
>>


ARCHETYPE C: CACOPHONY (AoE / Chaos / Disruption)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Noise bomb. You overwhelm areas with disorienting, damaging sound.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Screech         | Attack   | Cone AoE, moderate damage + 2s Disoriented (miss chance)
  - Bass Drop       | Attack   | AoE slam, damages and knocks back enemies in 5m
  - Tinnitus        | Debuff   | Target has 20% miss chance for 6s

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Wall of Sound   | Active   | Create a barrier of noise. Enemies crossing it are
                    |          | stunned 1.5s and take damage.
  - Discordant Aura | Aura     | Enemies within 8m deal 10% less damage
  - Shockwave       | Attack   | Line attack: damages all enemies in a row, damage
                    |          | increases per enemy hit

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Noise Complaint | Active   | Massive 15m AoE. All enemies Disoriented for 4s.
                    |          | Disoriented enemies that attack have 30% chance to
                    |          | hit an ally instead.
  - Feedback Shriek | Passive  | When you take a crit, emit a damaging pulse (8m)
  - Amp It Up       | Passive  | Your AoE abilities grow 20% larger radius

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Brown Note      | Active   | Target enemy flees in terror for 4s and takes DoT.
                    |          | Feared enemies spread fear to allies they pass. 40s CD.
  - Sound & Fury    | Passive  | Each enemy hit by your AoEs grants you +5% damage
                    |          | for 6s (stacks)

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Symphony of     | Ultimate | 20m radius for 8s. Constant AoE damage that escalates
    Destruction     |          | each second (+25% per tick). Enemies inside are slowed
                    |          | 40% and Disoriented. Allies inside gain +20% damage.
                    |          | 240s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Cacophony:
>>
>>

################################################################################
CLASS 4: ASHWRIGHT (Fire Crafter / Artificer)
################################################################################
Fantasy: You forge weapons, constructs, and destruction from living flame. Part
blacksmith, part pyromancer — you build and burn in equal measure.

ARCHETYPE A: FORGEMASTER (Constructs / Summons / Turrets)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Army builder. You create fire constructs that fight, tank, and zone.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Flame Turret    | Summon   | Place a turret that fires bolts for 15s. Max 2 turrets.
  - Forge Hammer    | Attack   | Melee strike that heals your nearest construct for 10% HP
  - Ember Sprite    | Summon   | Summon a small fire spirit. It attacks your target. 20s dur.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Reinforced Hull | Passive  | Constructs have +30% HP
  - Molten Core     | Passive  | When a construct dies, it explodes for AoE fire damage
  - Overclock Turret| Active   | Target turret fires 3x faster for 5s, then is destroyed

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Iron Golem      | Summon   | Summon a tanky fire golem. Taunts enemies, lasts 20s.
                    |          | Only 1 active at a time. 30s cooldown.
  - Forge Network   | Passive  | Constructs within 10m of each other gain +15% damage
  - Salvage         | Heal   | Destroy a construct to heal yourself for 30% of its max HP

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Master Blueprint| Passive  | +1 max turrets. Turrets now track and lead targets.
  - Awakened Forge  | Active   | All active constructs are healed to full and gain +50%
                    |          | damage for 10s. 60s cooldown.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Titan of Cinder | Ultimate | Merge all active constructs into a massive fire titan
                    |          | for 15s. The titan's power scales with constructs consumed
                    |          | (more = stronger). It has a cleave attack, fire breath,
                    |          | and taunts all enemies. 200s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Forgemaster:
>>
>>


ARCHETYPE B: PYROCLAST (Pure Fire Destruction)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Raw devastation. Biggest explosions, highest single-target burns.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Fireball        | Attack   | Classic ranged fire projectile, moderate damage
  - Ignite          | Debuff   | Target burns (DoT) for 5s
  - Kindle          | Passive  | Hitting a burning target grants +10% fire damage for 4s

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Wildfire        | Passive  | Ignite spreads to 1 nearby enemy on application
  - Combustion      | Attack   | If target is burning, consume the burn for instant damage
                    |          | equal to remaining DoT + 50%
  - Flashpoint      | Passive  | Crits apply Ignite automatically

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Pyroclasm       | Attack   | Channel for 2s, then launch a massive fireball. 3x damage
                    |          | of regular Fireball. Interrupting wastes the cooldown.
  - Living Bomb     | Debuff   | Target burns and explodes after 4s, damaging nearby enemies.
                    |          | If they die early, explosion is 50% bigger.
  - Ash Walker      | Passive  | Standing in fire (yours or enemy) grants +20% damage

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Eruption        | Active   | Targeted AoE: pillar of fire from below. High damage,
                    |          | 10m radius, leaves burning ground for 6s. 45s cooldown.
  - Fahrenheit      | Passive  | Each consecutive fire ability increases your fire damage
                    |          | by 8% (resets after 4s of no fire casts). Stacks 5x.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Supernova       | Ultimate | 3s channel. Gather all fire in a 20m radius (including
                    |          | burning enemies, burning ground, construct explosions).
                    |          | Release as a single cataclysmic blast. Damage scales with
                    |          | fire sources gathered. 240s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Pyroclast:
>>
>>


ARCHETYPE C: EMBER SAGE (Fire Support / Buffs / Utility)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Battlefield controller and force multiplier. You enhance allies with
flame-forged boons and control the field with fire terrain.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Tempered Blade  | Buff     | Enchant ally's weapon with fire. +15% damage as fire, 12s
  - Warm Glow       | Heal     | Moderate heal on ally. If they're near fire terrain, +50%
  - Firelight       | Utility  | Illuminate area (20m), revealing stealthed enemies for 10s

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Crucible        | Buff/Defense     | Ally gains +20% damage reduction for 8s. When it expires,
                    |          | they emit a fire burst around them.
  - Controlled Burn | Active   | Place fire terrain (8m diameter) for 10s. Allies on it
                    |          | regen HP. Enemies on it take DoT.
  - Quench          | Cleanse  | Remove all debuffs from ally. For each debuff removed,
                    |          | they gain +5% damage for 6s.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Forge Bond      | Buff/Heal     | Link two allies. They share 15% of healing received
                    |          | with each other for 12s.
  - Phoenix Ash     | Passive/Heal  | Your heals on targets below 30% HP are doubled
  - Signal Fire     | Active   | Place a beacon. Allies near it gain +15% crit chance.
                    |          | Lasts 12s. Only 1 active.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Reforged        | Active   | Target ally is cleansed, healed for 25% HP, and gains
                    |          | +30% damage for 8s. 45s cooldown.
  - Hearth          | Passive/Defense  | While standing in your fire terrain, allies cannot be
                    |          | critically hit and have +25% CC resistance

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Phoenix Pyre    | Ultimate | Designate an ally. If they die within 20s, they
                    |          | immediately resurrect at 50% HP with a fire explosion
                    |          | (massive AoE damage around them). If they don't die,
                    |          | they gain +25% all stats for 10s instead. 300s cooldown.

>> Your notes on Ember Sage:
>>
>>

################################################################################
CLASS 5: VOIDCALLER (Cosmic Horror Caster)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A scholar who stared too long into the abyss between stars and let something stare back, wielding alien psychic forces that corrode sanity as surely as they shred flesh.

ARCHETYPE A: ABYSSAL GAZE (Madness / Psychic Damage)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Inflict creeping psychic DoTs and escalating madness stacks that unravel an enemy's mind before their body gives out.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Mind Crack          | Attack   | Deal psychic damage to a single target; apply 1 stack of Fracture (max 10).
  - Whisper Barrage     | Active   | Fire 3 psychic bolts rapidly; each hit applies Fracture if target already has any.
  - Unnerving Gaze      | Debuff   | Stare at a target to reduce their damage output by 15% for 8s; applies 2 Fracture.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Echo of the Void    | Passive  | Each Fracture stack on a target amplifies your psychic damage to them by 2%.
  - Screaming Void      | Attack   | Unleash a psychic scream in a cone; deals damage and applies 3 Fracture to all hit.
  - Paranoia Seed       | Debuff   | Plant a psychic trigger; target attacks a random nearby ally once when next damaged.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Shatter Mind        | Active   | Consume all Fracture stacks on a target; deal burst psychic damage equal to 8x stacks.
  - Delusion Field      | Aura     | Enemies within 10m periodically lose 1 action to hallucinations (misfire, miss, idle).
  - Fractal Feedback    | Reactive | When you take damage, the attacker suffers 25% of the damage as psychic reflection.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Cascade Madness     | Active   | On Shatter Mind kill, spread 5 Fracture stacks to all enemies within 8m of the corpse.
  - Unmaking Gaze       | Channel  | Channel for 3s; a target's max HP is reduced by 2% per second, persisting for 30s.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Eye Opens       | Transform | For 15s you embody the Void: all attacks apply 5 Fracture, Shatter Mind has no cooldown, and enemies with 10 Fracture stacks are Dominated—fighting for you until they die.

>> Your notes on ABYSSAL GAZE:
>> Fracture is the core stacking debuff. The archetype rewards patience: build stacks, Shatter for burst.
>> Cascade Madness enables chain-kill scenarios in dense groups; synergizes well with AoE openers.
>>

ARCHETYPE B: GRAVITY WELL (Gravity Manipulation)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Reshape the battlefield with gravitational anomalies—pulling enemies together, crushing them under immense force, or flinging them into each other.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Tidal Pull          | Active   | Pull a single target 6m toward you; deals light impact damage on arrival.
  - Density Curse       | Debuff   | Increase target's effective weight; reduce their movement speed by 30% for 10s.
  - Micro-Collapse      | Attack   | Briefly collapse space around a target; deals moderate damage in a 2m radius.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Gravity Spike       | Attack   | Spike gravity beneath a target; launch them 5m into the air, dealing fall damage.
  - Orbital Decay       | Passive  | Enemies slowed by gravity effects take 10% increased damage from all sources.
  - Singularity Seed    | Active   | Place a gravity node; pulls all enemies within 12m toward it over 4s, then implodes.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Event Horizon       | CC       | Create a gravitational vortex at a location; enemies cannot leave the 8m radius for 5s.
  - Compression Wave    | Attack   | Crush all pulled/grouped enemies simultaneously for heavy AoE damage.
  - Zero-G Field        | Active   | Toggle a 10m zone to low gravity; enemies float and cannot use ground-based movement.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Tidal Lattice       | Passive  | Each enemy inside an Event Horizon increases Compression Wave damage by 20%.
  - Collapse Star       | Active   | Merge two Singularity Seeds simultaneously into a supernova dealing massive AoE damage.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Black Hole Protocol | Channel  | Channel for 2s to summon a true black hole for 8s; pulls everything in a 20m radius toward its center, dealing crushing damage per second, and enemies who reach the center are instantly incapacitated.

>> Your notes on GRAVITY WELL:
>> Strong positional control; Singularity Seed + Event Horizon + Compression Wave is the signature combo.
>> Zero-G Field creates interesting aerial vulnerability states worth designing enemy animations around.
>>

ARCHETYPE C: VOID SHEPHERD (Void Summons)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Tear rifts in reality to summon eldritch entities that serve as autonomous combatants, each with alien behaviors no mortal weapon possesses.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Rift Spawn          | Summon   | Summon a Void Mote (fragile melee creature) that attacks your target for 20s.
  - Tether Wisp         | Summon   | Summon a Wisp that latches to an enemy, reducing their healing received by 30%.
  - Shepherd's Call     | Passive/Utility  | Summoned entities have +15% HP and deal +10% damage when near you.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Abyssal Hound       | Summon   | Summon a Void Hound that pursues a target relentlessly, applying Fracture on each hit.
  - Rift Anchor         | Active   | Designate a Rift point; all your summons teleport to that point instantly.
  - Eldritch Pack       | Passive/Utility  | Each additional active summon grants all others +8% attack speed (max 3 summons).

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Tendril Horror      | Summon   | Summon a Tendril Horror that roots the nearest enemy for 3s, then drains HP per second.
  - Void Gate           | Active   | Open a permanent rift at a location; once per 30s, pull a random eldritch creature through.
  - Unravel Chorus      | Active   | Command all summons to self-destruct in a burst; each deals heavy AoE psychic damage.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Elder Spawn         | Summon   | Summon a powerful Elder Void Spawn; uses Abyssal Gaze and gravitational slam attacks.
  - Hive Mind           | Passive/Utility  | Your summons share a HP pool; when one dies, others absorb 50% of its remaining health.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Shepherded Abyss | Summon  | Tear open a Grand Rift for 20s; continuously spawns Void Motes, Hounds, and Tendril Horrors every 3s, and all summons gain the Unstoppable tag—immune to CC, banishment, and single-target deletion.

>> Your notes on VOID SHEPHERD:
>> Hive Mind is a critical defensive passive that makes managing a swarm far less punishing.
>> Unravel Chorus provides a burst-damage panic button, doubling as a sacrifice mechanic for the Hive Mind build.
>>

[YOUR OVERALL NOTES ON VOIDCALLER]
> Three deeply distinct play patterns: Abyssal Gaze is a methodical dot/burst caster; Gravity Well is a positional controller; Void Shepherd is a pet master.
> Consider cross-archetype synergy: Gravity Well's grouping + Shepherd's Unravel Chorus detonation could be a multi-archetype build path.
> Fracture stacks generated by Abyssal Hound (Shepherd) feeding into Shatter Mind (Gaze) creates a compelling hybrid identity.
>


################################################################################
CLASS 6: BLADESINGER (Martial Spellsword)
################################################################################
Fantasy: An elven warrior-mage tradition reborn for the battlefield—every sword stroke is a syllable, every spell a punctuation mark in a deadly living poem of steel and magic.

ARCHETYPE A: SWORD DANCE (Melee Combo Chains)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Build Rhythm stacks through flowing attack sequences and spend them on devastating finishers that reset the chain.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Opening Step        | Attack   | A quick strike that initiates your combo chain; generates 1 Rhythm.
  - Flowing Cut         | Attack   | Follow-up strike dealing 120% damage; generates 2 Rhythm if used after Opening Step.
  - Pivot Slash         | Attack   | Spinning strike hitting all enemies in a 180-degree arc; generates 1 Rhythm per enemy hit.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Dancer's Cadence    | Passive  | Every 5 Rhythm accumulated increases your attack speed by 5% (max 4 stacks).
  - Whirlwind Step      | Movement | Dash through an enemy dealing damage; resets your combo chain timer by 2s.
  - Rising Flourish     | Attack   | Launch an enemy upward; generates 3 Rhythm and enables aerial follow-up combos.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Crescendo Strike    | Active   | Consume all Rhythm; deal damage equal to 15x Rhythm stacks in a single blinding blow.
  - Phantom Echo        | Passive  | Your last 2 attacks replay as phantom hits at 40% damage 1s after you execute them.
  - Blade Waltz         | Stance   | Enter a flow state; for 10s every attack automatically chains to the next optimal combo hit.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Perfect Form        | Passive  | Using Crescendo Strike at 20+ Rhythm resets all Sword Dance cooldowns instantly.
  - Dervish Protocol    | Active   | For 8s, movement and attacks fuse—every step deals AoE damage equal to a basic attack.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Endless Dance   | Transform | Enter the Eternal Rhythm for 12s: Rhythm no longer caps, every strike generates 3 Rhythm, Crescendo Strike fires every 3s automatically at full accumulated power, and you are immune to interruption.

>> Your notes on SWORD DANCE:
>> Rhythm is the heartbeat of the archetype—a natural ramp-up/spend loop.
>> Phantom Echo creates satisfying visual feedback and combos beautifully with multi-hit finishers.
>>

ARCHETYPE B: SPELL WEAVE (Alternate Spell / Strike)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Alternate melee strikes and spell casts in precise alternating sequences to trigger Weave Resonance, amplifying both damage types.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Arcane Edge         | Attack   | A melee strike that primes your blade with magical charge for 3s.
  - Spark Slash         | Attack   | A spell-infused strike; if used while blade is charged, deal bonus arcane damage.
  - Interrupt Weave     | Passive  | Perfectly alternating strike-spell-strike sequences grant a 10% damage bonus to both.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Force Bolt Slash    | Active   | Fire a force bolt then immediately dash forward to strike; counts as both spell and strike.
  - Arcane Loop         | Passive  | Maintaining a perfect alternating sequence for 6+ actions grants Resonance (flat 20% dmg boost).
  - Spell Parry         | Reactive | Block an incoming spell with your blade; reflect 30% of its damage back.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Runic Barrage       | Active   | Unleash 4 rapid magical slashes that each count as alternating strike/spell for Resonance.
  - Spellblade Mastery  | Passive  | While Resonance is active, your spells gain melee range and your strikes gain spell range.
  - Phase Cut           | Attack   | A Weave-charged strike that teleports you behind the target, ignoring armor.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Resonance Overflow  | Active   | Expend Resonance to fire a beam of condensed spell-strike energy; pierces all targets in a line.
  - Infinite Weave      | Passive  | Resonance no longer expires until you break the alternating sequence.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Grand Synthesis     | Active   | Release all accumulated Resonance in a single perfect strike that simultaneously detonates as a nova spell—deals damage in both melee and 15m AoE, with each domain amplified by the number of perfectly-woven actions taken since last use.

>> Your notes on SPELL WEAVE:
>> Resonance rewards skilled, rhythmic play rather than button mashing—natural skill expression ceiling.
>> Spellblade Mastery at T3 is a defining identity moment: the line between caster and melee dissolves.
>>

ARCHETYPE C: WAR CHANT (Party Buff Auras)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Maintain combat songs through continued fighting; each song applies a distinct aura to all nearby allies, and switching songs mid-battle rewards tactical adaptation.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Chant of Iron       | Aura     | Nearby allies gain +10% physical damage while you are in melee combat.
  - Verse of Swiftness  | Aura     | Nearby allies gain +15% movement speed; cancels if you stop moving for 3s.
  - Battle Refrain      | Passive  | Each enemy you hit extends the duration of your active Chant by 1s.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Chant of the Storm  | Aura     | Allies' attacks have a 15% chance to trigger a minor lightning strike on hit.
  - Counterpoint        | Active   | Briefly sing a second Chant simultaneously for 6s, stacking both aura effects.
  - Warchanter's Vigor  | Passive/Heal  | Allies affected by your Chant regenerate 1% HP per 5s.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Chant of Ruin       | Aura     | Your attacks and allies' attacks apply a stacking armor-shred debuff (2% per hit, max 20%).
  - Harmonic Chorus     | Active   | Broadcast your current Chant at double radius and double potency for 8s.
  - Discordant Note     | Active   | Interrupt an enemy's spell or ability by singing a jarring tone; 20s cooldown.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Symphony of War     | Active   | Cycle through all three Chants in rapid succession; each plays for 3s in a 12s loop automatically.
  - Grand Crescendo     | Passive  | When you switch Chants, all allies within range receive a 5s burst of the outgoing Chant at 200% potency.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Eternal War Song | Toggle  | Activate to simultaneously maintain all three Chants at full power indefinitely; allies within 15m also gain immunity to silence and fear, and your Chants can no longer be interrupted or suppressed.

>> Your notes on WAR CHANT:
>> The Chant-switch mechanic via Grand Crescendo incentivizes active aura management rather than passive uptime.
>> Symphony of War is a good crutch for players who struggle with manual switching, while skilled players will prefer manual for the burst window Grand Crescendo provides.
>>

[YOUR OVERALL NOTES ON BLADESINGER]
> Each archetype serves a distinct role: Sword Dance is a pure melee carry, Spell Weave is a hybrid skirmisher, War Chant is a support-melee hybrid.
> Cross-archetype potential: War Chant's Chant of Iron synergizes directly with Sword Dance's Rhythm damage scaling.
> The class rewards dexterity and rhythm in all three branches, unifying the class identity mechanically even when the systems differ.
>


################################################################################
CLASS 7: NECROSURGEON (Scientific Undeath)
################################################################################
Fantasy: Not a dark priest but a cold-eyed physician of mortality—dissecting the boundary between life and death with scalpel and suture, treating undeath as an engineering problem to be optimized.

ARCHETYPE A: REANIMATOR (Construct Undead from Parts)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Harvest body parts from fallen enemies and stitch together custom undead constructs with modular abilities determined by the components used.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Harvest Limb        | Utility  | Extract a usable part (arm, leg, torso, head) from a fresh corpse; stored in your Kit.
  - Crude Assembly      | Summon   | Stitch together a basic Shambler from 2 parts; its stats depend on part quality.
  - Field Suture        | Passive/Defense  | Your assembled undead have +20% HP and do not degrade over time.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Specialist Graft    | Active   | Attach a harvested arm to your construct, granting it a ranged attack or grab ability.
  - Head Transplant     | Active   | Replace your construct's head with a harvested one; grants it a unique passive aura.
  - Redundant Systems   | Passive/Defense  | Your constructs have a 50% chance to survive a killing blow with 1 HP (once per construct).

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Composite Horror    | Summon   | Assemble a large construct from 5 parts simultaneously; gains abilities from all sources.
  - Surgical Upgrade    | Active   | Spend 10s operating on an existing construct to restore 50% HP and upgrade one of its parts.
  - Part Catalog        | Passive  | You can store up to 6 harvested parts; higher-tier enemies yield higher-quality parts.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Optimal Configuration | Active | Rearrange all parts on your construct instantly for free; swap in stored parts mid-combat.
  - Mass Harvest        | Active   | Simultaneously harvest one part from every corpse in a 12m radius after a battle.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Masterwork Abomination | Summon | Spend 8 parts to assemble a Masterwork—a fully autonomous undead titan with combined abilities of all parts, self-repair, and an AoE slam that counts as your own attack for skill interaction purposes.

>> Your notes on REANIMATOR:
>> The part system needs a clear part-type taxonomy in the full design doc (arm, leg, torso, skull, organ, etc.).
>> Head Transplant granting passive auras is a great build-crafter moment—different enemy heads could grant wildly different utilities.
>>

ARCHETYPE B: FLESHCRAFT (Self-Modification)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Graft harvested or synthesized undead tissue onto your own body to gain persistent physical upgrades, becoming a walking chimera of stolen capabilities.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Bone Plating        | Passive/Defense  | Graft subdermal bone plates; gain +8% physical damage reduction permanently.
  - Necrotic Fist       | Passive  | Graft a reinforced knuckle; your unarmed/melee strikes deal bonus necrotic damage.
  - Dead Nerve Cluster  | Passive/Immunity  | Graft pain-suppressing tissue; you are immune to pain-based CC (stagger, flinch).

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Auxiliary Limb      | Active   | Graft a third arm to your torso; wield an extra weapon or item simultaneously.
  - Venom Gland         | Active   | Graft a harvested venom sac; spit corrosive acid (5s cooldown, applies AoE DoT).
  - Muscle Splice       | Passive  | Graft hypertrophied muscle tissue; increase carry weight and melee damage by 15%.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Dead Man's Eyes     | Passive  | Graft undead eyes that see life force; detect all living creatures through walls within 20m.
  - Reflex Nerve Web    | Passive/Evasion  | Graft a secondary nervous system; gain +20% dodge chance and reaction speed.
  - Organ Reservoir     | Passive  | Graft an extra organ cavity; store 2 additional active grafts beyond your normal limit.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Full Conversion     | Active   | Temporarily suppress all living tissue; become Undead-type for 30s (immune to life-drain, mind effects, and poison).
  - Adaptive Carapace   | Reactive/Defense | When you receive a new damage type for the first time in a fight, grow resistance to it (+15%) permanently until rest.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Masterwork Self | Transform | Complete your self-modification: permanently become a Flesh Construct—retain intelligence and class abilities, gain immunity to disease, poison, and fear, regenerate 2% HP/s, and each graft slot now holds two grafts simultaneously.

>> Your notes on FLESHCRAFT:
>> Graft slot limits are critical for balance; Organ Reservoir and Masterwork Self intentionally expand them as a progression reward.
>> Full Conversion is an important defensive pivot tool—timing it against specific enemy types should feel skillful.
>>

ARCHETYPE C: SOUL HARVEST (Soul Energy Resource)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Capture and refine the souls of slain enemies as Soul Essence, a versatile resource spent on amplifying your other abilities, powering constructs, or devastating soul-based attacks.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Soul Snare          | Utility  | On killing blow, passively capture a Soul Essence from the target (max 10 stored).
  - Essence Bolt        | Attack   | Spend 1 Essence to hurl a condensed soul shard; deals spirit damage, bypasses armor.
  - Spectral Shell      | Buff/Shield     | Spend 2 Essence to wrap yourself in soul-energy; absorb the next instance of damage.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Soul Tap            | Active   | Drain 3 Essence from a weakened (below 25% HP) living target without killing them.
  - Essence Infusion    | Active   | Spend 3 Essence to empower a construct; it gains +30% damage and AoE for 20s.
  - Resonant Collection | Passive  | Boss and elite enemies yield 3 Essence on death instead of 1.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Soul Detonation     | Active   | Spend 5 Essence; release a 10m AoE explosion of spirit energy dealing heavy damage.
  - Spectral Minion     | Summon   | Spend 4 Essence to manifest a soul as a temporary ghost fighter for 30s.
  - Essence Overload    | Passive  | When you hold 10 Essence, your next ability is automatically cast at 150% power.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Grand Harvester     | Passive  | All kills in a 15m radius grant you Essence, not just your own killing blows.
  - Soul Forge          | Active   | Spend 8 Essence to forge a Soul Weapon—a spectral blade wielded by your dominant construct.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Soulstorm Engine    | Channel  | Channel for 3s, spending all stored Essence; for each point spent, launch a seeking soul shard that homes on the nearest enemy. At 10 Essence, trigger a Soulstorm—a 20m tempest of spirit energy lasting 10s that continuously damages and drains all enemies within.

>> Your notes on SOUL HARVEST:
>> Essence as a second resource layered on top of normal cooldowns adds meaningful economy decisions.
>> Grand Harvester is a pivotal group-play passive—in a party, every ally kill fuels your economy.
>>

[YOUR OVERALL NOTES ON NECROSURGEON]
> The class has three deeply interlocking systems: parts (for constructs), grafts (for self), and Essence (for fuel).
> A multi-archetype build using Reanimator + Soul Harvest creates a loop: kills yield Essence AND parts, which build more constructs, which generate more kills.
> The clinical, scientific tone sets this class apart from the typical necromancer fantasy—ability names should reflect surgical precision.
>


################################################################################
CLASS 8: STORMBORN (Lightning / Weather)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A mortal struck by a storm-god's bolt and reborn as a living thunderhead—channeling the raw violence of sky and weather into weapons of terrifying precision and scale.

ARCHETYPE A: THUNDERLORD (Pure Lightning Burst)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Charge, focus, and discharge massive bolts of lightning against single targets, building Voltage for explosive releases that leave the battlefield scorched.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Arc Strike          | Attack   | Hurl a lightning bolt at a single target; generates 10 Voltage.
  - Grounding Pulse     | Debuff   | Reduce target's lightning resistance by 20% for 8s; generates 5 Voltage.
  - Capacitor Stance    | Stance   | Enter a charging stance; passively generate 5 Voltage per second while stationary.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Overcharge Shot     | Attack   | Fire a high-energy bolt consuming 30 Voltage; deals bonus damage proportional to Voltage spent.
  - Lightning Reflex    | Passive  | After dodging an attack, your next bolt fires instantly without animation delay.
  - Chain Arc           | Passive  | Your bolts chain to 1 additional nearby enemy for 50% damage (chains to 2 at 50+ Voltage).

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Megabolt            | Channel  | Channel for 1.5s, consuming all Voltage; fire a single devastating strike dealing damage per Voltage.
  - Storm's Eye         | Buff     | Enter a calm focus; for 6s, every attack generates double Voltage and deals +25% damage.
  - Ionize              | Debuff   | Coat a target in static charge; they take +40% lightning damage for 12s.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Superconductor      | Passive  | Ionize now spreads to 2 adjacent enemies when the primary target is struck by Megabolt.
  - Perpetual Storm     | Passive  | When Megabolt kills a target, regain 50% of the Voltage spent.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - God Bolt            | Active   | Accumulate to maximum Voltage (100), then release the God Bolt—a single column of divine lightning striking from the sky with a 5m radius that instantly kills non-boss enemies below 30% HP and deals catastrophic damage to all others; leaves a Scorched Zone for 10s.

>> Your notes on THUNDERLORD:
>> Voltage is a straightforward ramp-up resource; the tension between spending early or saving for Megabolt/God Bolt defines the skill expression.
>> Ionize + Superconductor enabling spread creates a way for a "single-target" archetype to impact multiple enemies at T4.
>>

ARCHETYPE B: GALE FORCE (Wind Control / Positioning)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Command the wind to push, pull, and reposition enemies and allies with surgical precision, controlling the geometry of every engagement.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Wind Shove          | Active   | Blast a target with wind, pushing them 6m in the chosen direction.
  - Updraft             | Movement | Launch yourself upward 8m; gain extended hang time and free fall control.
  - Crosswind           | Debuff   | Create a persistent wind current in a line; projectiles fired through it are deflected off-course.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Cyclone Grab        | CC       | Whip a small cyclone around a target; lift and spin them in place for 3s, suppressing action.
  - Gale Wall           | Active   | Erect a 10m wall of focused wind that blocks movement and slows projectiles by 60%.
  - Tailwind            | Buff/Movement     | Grant an ally a wind boost; they move 40% faster and their next dash covers double distance.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Rift Gust           | Active   | Pull all enemies in a 10m cone 8m toward you simultaneously.
  - Wind Walk           | Toggle/Defense   | Become partially air; move through enemies freely and take 20% less physical damage (no attacks while active).
  - Hurricane Toss      | Active   | Grab a target with wind and hurl them at another enemy or surface; both targets take impact damage.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Maelstrom           | Active   | Create a massive rotating wind zone (15m radius) for 8s; enemies inside are continuously repositioned randomly.
  - Aero Mastery        | Passive  | All your push/pull effects deal bonus impact damage equal to 10% of target's max HP.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Eye of the Gale     | Active   | Become the center of a 20m permanent cyclone for 15s: enemies are continuously pushed to the outer ring, allies in the inner ring (5m) gain 30% damage reduction and 25% speed, and any projectile fired into the zone is captured and redirected toward your current target.

>> Your notes on GALE FORCE:
>> Positioning control is tricky to balance—Hurricane Toss needs clear collision damage calculations.
>> Eye of the Gale is a grand teamfight ultimate; place it at a chokepoint to split enemies from allies elegantly.
>>

ARCHETYPE C: STORMFRONT (Weather Zone Control)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Summon persistent weather phenomena across the battlefield—each zone alters rules of engagement for everyone inside, rewarding you for fighting on terrain you have prepared.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Rain Squall         | Active   | Create a rain zone (12m radius, 30s); wet enemies inside take +15% lightning damage.
  - Fog Bank            | Active   | Roll in dense fog over 10m; reduces visibility and accuracy for all inside by 30%.
  - Static Field        | Aura     | Emit a low-level static field; nearby wet enemies take 5 lightning damage per second.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Hailstorm           | Active   | Call a hail zone (10m, 20s); deals light AoE physical damage per second to enemies inside.
  - Weather Reader      | Passive/Immunity  | You always know the current weather state of every active zone; you take no penalties inside your own zones.
  - Lightning Rod       | Active   | Plant a rod in the ground; for 30s it attracts all your bolts to arc through it, hitting all wet targets in the zone.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Thunderhead         | Summon   | Summon a storm cloud that drifts over the battlefield for 20s, randomly striking random enemies below it every 3s.
  - Converging Fronts   | Active   | Merge two of your active weather zones; the combined zone gains both effects at 150% potency.
  - Monsoon Protocol    | Passive  | Rain Squall now soaks targets instantly on entry; soaked targets are also slowed by 20%.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Perfect Storm       | Active   | Simultaneously summon Rain Squall, Hailstorm, and a Thunderhead in the same zone; all three stack.
  - Weatherkeeper       | Passive  | Your weather zones last 50% longer and can be re-centered on your position once each.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Grand Tempest   | Channel  | Channel for 3s to call a full-map weather event for 30s: all terrain becomes wet (lightning vulnerability), visibility drops globally (ranged accuracy -25%), hail falls everywhere (constant AoE damage), and you gain the Stormborn's Eye—complete immunity to your own weather effects and +50% lightning damage.

>> Your notes on STORMFRONT:
>> Weather zone stacking requires careful ruleset: each zone effect needs to be flagged as stackable or exclusive.
>> Perfect Storm at T4 intentionally previews the Legendary's full-map version—satisfying power escalation feel.
>>

[YOUR OVERALL NOTES ON STORMBORN]
> Thunderlord is vertical (single-target burst), Gale Force is lateral (spatial control), Stormfront is environmental (battlefield shaping).
> The wet condition created by Stormfront's rain synergizes directly with Thunderlord's lightning damage—a compelling multi-archetype axis.
> Consider a Weathervane passive in the base class that applies minor wet stacks to all Thunderlord bolts during rain zones.
>


################################################################################
CLASS 9: GLACIARCH (Ice Architect)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A master of absolute cold who treats the battlefield as a sculptor treats marble—reshaping terrain with ice walls and bridges, encasing enemies in frost, then shattering them like glass.

ARCHETYPE A: PERMAFROST (Ice Terrain / Zone Control)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Coat the battlefield in persistent ice terrain that slows and debilitates enemies while your own movement remains fluid on the frozen ground.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Frost Spread        | Active   | Flash-freeze a 6m patch of ground; enemies crossing it are slowed by 25%.
  - Rime Coat           | Passive  | Your footsteps leave a thin frost trail that applies a minor slow (10%) to followers.
  - Cold Snap           | Active   | Instantly freeze a 3m patch of wet or moist ground into solid slippery ice.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Glacial Creep       | Toggle   | Continuously expand ice terrain outward from your position at 2m/s while toggled on (costs 5 energy/s).
  - Arctic Footing      | Passive/Movement  | You and allies move at full speed on ice terrain you have created.
  - Deep Freeze Zone    | Active   | Designate a 10m area; apply heavy chill to all enemies who remain inside for 2s or more.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Permafrost Plate    | Active   | Lay a massive 15m frozen zone that persists for 60s; enemies inside suffer stacking Frostbite (DoT).
  - Absolute Zero Field | Aura     | Emit intense cold in a 6m radius; enemy movement speed in this aura is halved.
  - Tundra Lock         | Active   | Rapidly freeze all existing ice terrain solid simultaneously; enemies on it are rooted for 3s.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Ice Age             | Active   | Expand all active ice terrain by 50% instantly and refresh their durations.
  - Frostbite Cascade   | Passive  | Enemies who leave ice terrain still carry Frostbite for 5s; it deals increasing damage over time.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Permafrost Dominion | Toggle | Activate to continuously convert all terrain within 30m into deep ice for as long as you maintain it; enemies on this terrain take constant Frostbite damage, have their speed reduced by 40%, and cannot use dash or teleport abilities, while you gain 20% damage reduction on ice you have created.

>> Your notes on PERMAFROST:
>> Terrain control needs a clear visual language—distinct ice tile shading for different freeze depths.
>> Tundra Lock's root synergizes perfectly with Shatter archetype's burst damage timing.
>>

ARCHETYPE B: SHATTER (Brittle + Burst Damage)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Apply the Brittle debuff through freezing attacks, then trigger explosive shattering that converts accumulated frost into devastating burst damage.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Frost Bite          | Attack   | Strike with cold, dealing ice damage and applying 1 stack of Brittle.
  - Glacial Tap         | Attack   | A light strike applying 2 Brittle; low damage but fast cast with no cooldown.
  - Brittle Theory      | Passive  | Brittle-affected enemies take 5% more physical damage per stack (max 10 stacks).

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Ice Lance           | Attack   | Hurl a javelin of ice; deals high damage and applies 3 Brittle on hit.
  - Stress Fracture     | Debuff   | Apply a hairline crack to a target; any hit within 5s applies double Brittle from that hit.
  - Shatter Impact      | Active   | Slam Brittle-afflicted target; consume all stacks to deal 20x stacks as burst damage.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Crystallize         | CC       | Fully encase a target in ice for 4s; they accumulate 1 Brittle per second while encased.
  - Cascade Shatter     | Passive  | Shattering a target sends shrapnel to 3 nearby enemies, each taking 30% of the burst damage.
  - Absolute Fracture   | Passive  | At 10 Brittle stacks, target's armor is reduced to 0 for the next hit.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Thousand Splinters  | Active   | Shatter a Crystallized target in a 10m AoE detonation; all fragments apply 3 Brittle to new targets.
  - Cold Calculus       | Passive  | Each point of Brittle on a target increases your crit chance against them by 3%.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Fracture Climax     | Active   | Apply 10 Brittle to all enemies within 15m simultaneously, then trigger Shatter Impact on each one automatically in sequence—each shattering adds its shrapnel damage to a growing pool that is released as a final nova when the last target shatters.

>> Your notes on SHATTER:
>> Brittle stacking + detonation is a classic amplify-then-burst loop; the skill is in setup and timing the shatter.
>> Crystallize is a setup CC that also passively builds toward detonation—elegant self-contained mechanic.
>>

ARCHETYPE C: CRYOMANCER (Ice Constructs / Walls)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Sculpt functional structures from conjured ice—walls, bridges, towers, and turrets—that reshape traversal and combat space in real time.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Ice Wall            | Active   | Erect a 5m solid ice wall (1.5m thick) that blocks movement and projectiles; lasts 30s.
  - Frost Bridge        | Active   | Conjure a 10m bridge of ice across a gap or over an obstacle; persists for 60s.
  - Sculptor's Touch    | Passive  | Your ice constructs have +50% HP and last 30% longer.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Ice Turret          | Summon   | Conjure a stationary ice turret that fires frost bolts at nearby enemies; lasts 20s.
  - Collapse Trigger    | Active   | Detonate an ice construct remotely; it shatters into shrapnel dealing AoE physical damage.
  - Wall Walk           | Passive  | You and allies can walk up your ice walls as ramps at full speed.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Ice Dome            | Active   | Encase a 6m radius in an ice hemisphere; blocks all projectiles from entering or leaving.
  - Frozen Spike Array  | Active   | Raise a field of ice spikes from the ground in a 4m line; deals damage and blocks movement.
  - Crystal Resonance   | Passive  | When an ice construct is destroyed, nearby enemies receive 3 Brittle stacks from the cold burst.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Glacial Fortress    | Active   | Instantly raise a 4-walled ice structure with a firing slit; you can shoot through the slit at protected positions.
  - Architect's Will    | Passive  | You can now maintain up to 6 active ice constructs simultaneously (up from 3).

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Grand Glacier   | Channel  | Channel for 4s to raise a full fortress of ice: walls, dome, 4 turrets, and a spike array auto-place in optimal positions around you; the entire structure is linked—destroying one piece does not collapse others, each turret fires twice as fast, and the dome refracts light to grant you and allies inside a 20% dodge bonus.

>> Your notes on CRYOMANCER:
>> Ice constructs need collision rules established early—can they be placed inside enemies? On slopes?
>> Crystal Resonance creating Brittle on destruction is the primary synergy bridge to the Shatter archetype.
>>

[YOUR OVERALL NOTES ON GLACIARCH]
> Permafrost creates the stage, Shatter provides the damage engine, Cryomancer provides the structural layer.
> The shared Brittle condition is the connective tissue: Permafrost's Frostbite doesn't apply Brittle but Cryomancer's Crystal Resonance does, so all three archetypes interact naturally.
> A multi-archetype Glaciarch could run: freeze zone (Permafrost) + Ice Dome (Cryomancer) + Fracture Climax (Shatter) for a devastating zoned detonation combo.
>


################################################################################
CLASS 10: BLOOD ALCHEMIST (Blood Magic)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A heretic scholar who discovered that blood is the universal solvent of magic—willing to bleed themselves dry for power, puppet enemies through their own veins, or weave life between allies like a crimson thread.

ARCHETYPE A: SACRIFICE (HP as Resource / High Risk)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Spend your own hit points as currency to unleash abilities of terrifying power, thriving in the red and punishing enemies for bringing you near death.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Blood Price         | Passive  | Unlock the ability to spend HP to cast abilities; no energy cost when sacrificing blood.
  - Crimson Bolt        | Attack   | Spend 5% max HP to fire a blood-fueled projectile dealing 180% of HP spent as magic damage.
  - Pain Threshold      | Passive  | Below 50% HP, gain +10% damage. Below 25% HP, gain an additional +15% damage.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Hemorrhage Wave     | Active   | Spend 10% max HP to release a blood wave in a 10m cone dealing damage and applying Bleed.
  - Vital Surge         | Active   | Spend 20% max HP to instantly cast your next ability at double power with no cast time.
  - Defiant Ichor       | Passive/Immunity  | When you drop below 15% HP, gain a 5s window of damage immunity (once per fight).

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Sanguine Pact       | Toggle   | Toggle on to continuously lose 2% HP/s in exchange for +30% damage and +20% cast speed.
  - Blood Nova          | Active   | Spend 30% max HP to detonate a 15m blood nova dealing massive AoE damage equal to HP spent.
  - Red Mist            | Passive/Heal  | Each time you lose HP to a sacrifice, gain a stacking 2% lifesteal (resets on rest, max 10).

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Martyr's Conviction | Passive  | If you survive 3 separate killing blows in a fight (via Defiant Ichor or similar), your sacrifice costs are halved permanently for the rest of the encounter.
  - Exsanguinate        | Active   | Spend 40% max HP; reduce all active cooldowns to 0 instantly.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Final Offering  | Active   | Sacrifice yourself to 1 HP; in exchange, unleash a catastrophic Blood Cataclysm in a 25m radius dealing damage equal to 500% of total HP sacrificed across the fight, then instantly restore to 50% max HP if the cast kills at least one enemy.

>> Your notes on SACRIFICE:
>> The archetype demands HP sustain from somewhere—pair with Transfusion or enemy lifesteal to make the glass-cannon loop viable.
>> Martyr's Conviction requires careful tracking; a fight UI element showing the "survival count" is essential for player clarity.
>>

ARCHETYPE B: HEMOMANCY (Blood Control / CC)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Seize direct control of an enemy's blood—immobilizing them by crystallizing it, forcing involuntary movements, or puppeting them as an unwilling weapon against their allies.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Clot               | Debuff   | Thicken a target's blood; reduce their movement speed by 30% and attack speed by 15% for 8s.
  - Hemorrhage          | Debuff   | Induce internal bleeding; apply a Bleed DoT dealing 3% max HP per second for 5s.
  - Sanguine Sense      | Passive  | You detect the heartbeat of all living targets within 25m; they cannot hide from you.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Blood Lock          | CC       | Crystallize a target's blood; root them in place for 4s and increase their damage taken by 20%.
  - Puppet String       | Active   | Force a target to move 5m in a direction of your choosing; they deal collision damage if hitting terrain.
  - Boil               | Debuff   | Rapidly heat a target's blood; they take 5% max HP as fire damage per second and lose 10% armor for 8s.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Full Puppet         | CC       | Assume full control of a non-boss enemy for 6s; use them as a player-controlled pawn.
  - Hemorrhagic Burst   | Active   | Detonate all active Bleed effects on a target simultaneously for a massive burst of damage.
  - Blood Tether        | Active   | Link two enemies; any damage one receives is split 50/50 with the tethered partner for 10s.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Cascade Control     | Passive  | Using Full Puppet on an enemy causes all enemies within 6m to be Rooted for the puppet's duration.
  - Vascular Override   | Active   | Permanently afflict a target with a passive Bleed that stacks once every time they attack; stacks indefinitely.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Sanguine Dominion   | Active   | For 20s, assume passive hemomantic control over all bleeding enemies in a 30m radius—they deal 50% reduced damage, move at 60% speed, and once per 5s you may force any one of them to attack a nearby ally of their own accord; cannot be cleansed.

>> Your notes on HEMOMANCY:
>> Full Puppet at T3 is a defining class moment—needs robust controls for what the player can command the puppet to do.
>> Blood Tether is a deceptively powerful AoE damage multiplier; using it on a tank-type then hammering them deals 150% of normal damage total.
>>

ARCHETYPE C: TRANSFUSION (Blood Healing / Support)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Manipulate the flow of life between targets—drawing excess vitality from the healthy, redirecting it to the wounded, or weaving blood links that create living safety nets for your allies.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Life Draw           | Heal     | Drain 8% HP from a target and transfer it to yourself or a chosen ally.
  - Clot Seal           | Heal     | Seal a wound instantly; stop all Bleed effects on an ally and restore 5% of their max HP.
  - Blood Bond          | Passive/Heal  | While you have an active blood link to an ally, your heals on them are 20% more effective.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Sanguine Transfusion | Heal  | Transfer up to 25% of your own HP to a target ally as healing; no cooldown but shares your HP pool.
  - Hemorrhage Harvest   | Active  | Draw from an enemy's Bleed; convert their DoT damage into healing for you or an ally.
  - Vital Lattice       | Buff/Defense     | Create a blood web connecting 3 allies; whenever one takes damage, it's shared equally among all three for 15s.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Emergency Infusion  | Reactive/Heal | Trigger automatically when an ally drops below 10% HP; instantly transfer 20% of your HP to them.
  - Soul Leak           | Active   | Drain 15% HP from all enemies in a 10m radius; evenly distribute the total among all allies.
  - Vitae Overflow      | Passive/Shield  | Healing that exceeds a target's max HP is stored as an Overheal shield (max 20% of max HP).

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Mass Transfusion    | Heal   | Simultaneously apply Sanguine Transfusion to all allies in a 15m radius; each receives 10% of your HP as healing.
  - Blood Economy       | Passive/Heal  | Each point of HP you sacrifice via Sacrifice archetype abilities generates 0.5% of that HP as healing distributed among allies.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Eternal Circuit | Channel  | Channel for 2s to create a 30s blood circuit linking all allies: damage dealt to any member is redistributed evenly among all; healing any one member heals all by 50% of the amount; and any Bleed effect applied to you is reflected in full to the enemy who applied it.

>> Your notes on TRANSFUSION:
>> Blood Economy passive is the key multi-archetype bridge—a Sacrifice/Transfusion hybrid plays as a self-harming support.
>> Vital Lattice requires careful math on damage-share to prevent it from trivializing solo-target encounters.
>>

[YOUR OVERALL NOTES ON BLOOD ALCHEMIST]
> Blood is simultaneously the class's weapon, resource, and currency—all three archetypes use it differently and that unification is the class's identity.
> Multi-archetype play: Sacrifice + Transfusion creates a painful support (bleed to heal others), while Hemomancy + Sacrifice creates a glass-cannon CC-burst hybrid.
> The class needs a clear visual UI for HP-as-resource; a blood gauge that fills as HP drops, distinct from the HP bar itself, would communicate risk and power simultaneously.
>


################################################################################
CLASS 11: DREAMWALKER (Sleep / Dream / Psychic)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A wanderer between the waking world and the realm of dreams, who has learned to drag the terrors of slumber into reality and bend the fabric of perception until no one can be sure what is real.

ARCHETYPE A: NIGHTMARE (Fear / DoT / Madness)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Infect enemies with waking nightmares that deal escalating psychic damage, sow fear that degrades their performance, and eventually shatter their grip on reality entirely.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Dark Visions        | Debuff   | Inflict vivid nightmares on a target; apply 3s of Frightened (reduced attack accuracy by 20%).
  - Dream Poison        | Attack   | Inject a psychic DoT that deals 4% max HP per second for 6s; stacks up to 3 times.
  - Fearful Presence    | Aura     | Passively radiate dread; enemies within 8m have a 15% chance to flinch on each attack.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Screaming Hallucination | Active | Target sees a horrifying apparition and runs in a random direction for 3s (fear CC).
  - Deepening Dark      | Passive/Utility  | Each Dream Poison stack on a target amplifies all fear effects on them by 15%.
  - Paranoid Break      | Debuff   | Convince a target their allies are enemies; they deal 20% of their attacks to random nearby allies for 8s.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Nightmare Loop      | Active   | Trap a target in a recurring nightmare; they repeat their last 2 seconds of actions on loop for 4s, dealing self-inflicted damage each cycle.
  - Terror Cascade      | Passive/Utility  | When a target dies while Frightened, all enemies within 8m are Panicked (flee) for 3s.
  - Waking Horror       | Active   | Materialize an enemy's personal nightmare as a creature; it targets only them for 10s.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Unending Night      | Passive/Utility  | Dream Poison DoTs never fall off on their own; only Cleanse effects remove them.
  - Mind Shatter        | Active   | Consume all Dream Poison stacks on a target; deal burst psychic damage plus 5s of full Madness (total loss of control).

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Night That Swallows | Active | Plunge all enemies within 25m into a shared Nightmare Realm for 12s: all are Frightened, all suffer Dream Poison at 3 stacks, all see phantom versions of their allies attacking them (causing confused friendly fire), and any enemy who drops below 20% HP during this window is instantly consumed by the nightmare and dies.

>> Your notes on NIGHTMARE:
>> The fear/DoT combo creates a natural pressure loop: damage forces reactions, fear degrades those reactions.
>> Nightmare Loop is mechanically inventive—forcing a replay of actions should trigger interesting interactions with channeled abilities or movement.
>>

ARCHETYPE B: LUCID (Reality Warping Buffs)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Achieve perfect lucid dream control and bend shared reality to your will—granting allies impossible physical feats, distorting time locally, and rewriting the rules of cause and effect briefly.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Waking Dream        | Buff     | Grant an ally a burst of clarity; their next ability fires at 200% speed with no cast time.
  - Elastic Reality     | Buff     | Stretch the local fabric of space around an ally; their melee reach doubles for 8s.
  - Dream Step          | Buff     | Let an ally phase briefly; their next movement ignores collision and passes through enemies.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Shared Lucidity     | Aura     | Allies within 10m gain 10% increased critical hit chance as reality becomes fluid around you.
  - Echo Action         | Active   | Record an ally's last action and replay it once for free 2s later (attack, heal, or ability).
  - Time Smear          | Buff     | Slow time in a 6m radius around an ally for 5s; they act at normal speed, enemies are slowed 40%.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Dream Duplicate     | Active   | Create a perfect illusory copy of an ally for 8s; the copy mimics all their actions at 60% power.
  - Impossible Geometry | Active   | Briefly warp space; a target ally can attack from any angle, ignoring line-of-sight for 6s.
  - Causal Inversion    | Active   | Reverse the last 3s of a single target's damage received; they are healed for the amount instead.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Dreamforge          | Active   | Conjure any simple non-magical item from dream matter; it is real for 60s (rope, ladder, door, etc.).
  - Collective Lucidity | Aura     | All allies in a 15m radius enter a shared lucid state; each Echo Action also echoes to all other affected allies.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Waking World Rewritten | Active | For 10s, fully invert the rules of reality for allies within 20m: all damage they receive becomes healing, all their cooldowns tick at triple speed, and each of their kills spawns a Dream Echo that fights alongside them for 15s; this effect cannot be dispelled.

>> Your notes on LUCID:
>> Echo Action is the sleeper OP ability—replaying a channeled heal or a massive cooldown needs explicit rules on what can and cannot be echoed.
>> Causal Inversion is an incredible clutch save and should have a short but noticeable animation to communicate it clearly to both teams.
>>

ARCHETYPE C: SANDMAN (Sleep CC / Support)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Lull enemies into enchanted slumber and exploit the sleeping state with empowered abilities, while cushioning allies from harm by slipping them into brief protective micro-sleeps.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Drowse              | CC       | Inflict drowsiness on a target; they are Slowed by 30% and have 20% chance to miss each action.
  - Lullaby             | Active   | Sing a soft note; a single non-boss enemy falls Asleep for 5s (breaks on damage).
  - Dream Guard         | Buff/Shield     | Place a protective dream on an ally; the next damage they take is negated and they briefly Drowse the attacker.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Mass Lullaby        | Active   | Extend the sleep song to a 8m radius; all non-boss enemies with below 40% HP fall Asleep.
  - Somnolent Aura      | Aura     | Your presence gradually fatigues enemies; after 10s in your presence, they are Drowsed automatically.
  - Dream Thief         | Active   | Steal the active buff of a Sleeping enemy and transfer it to yourself or an ally.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Amplified Nightmare | Passive  | Sleeping targets who take damage to wake them take 50% bonus damage from that hit.
  - Hypnotic Suggestion | Active   | Whisper a command to a Sleeping target; they follow one instruction on waking (attack ally, drop weapon, retreat) before regaining will.
  - Slumbering Shield   | Active   | Put an ally into a protective 3s micro-sleep; they are invulnerable but cannot act; on waking, gain a burst of 20% max HP.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Eternal Slumber     | Active   | Extend a Sleeping target's sleep indefinitely until something other than your own abilities wakes them; pairs with Dream Thief looping.
  - Somnatic Transfer   | Active   | Transfer the Sleep condition from one target to another nearby enemy without waking the first.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Grand Lullaby   | Channel  | Channel for 3s, singing a world-stopping song; all enemies within 30m fall into Deep Sleep for 15s (cannot be broken by damage, only by death or Cleanse), all sleeping enemies are afflicted with Nightmare-state DoTs, and all allies receive Slumbering Shield simultaneously; when the song ends, every sleeping enemy wakes with a Hypnotic Suggestion already implanted: attack the nearest enemy.

>> Your notes on SANDMAN:
>> Amplified Nightmare is the primary bridge to the Nightmare archetype—guarantees the massive burst damage window.
>> Eternal Slumber + Dream Thief creates an infinite buff-theft loop on a single sleeping enemy; needs a cap or diminishing returns rule.
>>

[YOUR OVERALL NOTES ON DREAMWALKER]
> The three archetypes represent offense (Nightmare), support (Lucid), and control (Sandman)—a rare class that can fill all three roles depending on build.
> Cross-archetype synergy: Sandman's sleep + Nightmare's Dream Poison DoT + Amplified Nightmare passive = a setup/detonation combo that rewards cross-archetype investment.
> The class demands thoughtful visual design: all abilities should have a dreamlike, half-real aesthetic (dissolving edges, spectral colors) to sell the fantasy that reality itself is unstable.
>


################################################################################
CLASS 12: Graviton (Sci-fi Gravity Warrior)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A warrior who bends spacetime itself, wielding gravitational forces as weapon and armor — crushing enemies under impossible weight, hurling them across the battlefield, and collapsing space into devastating singularities.

ARCHETYPE A: Crush (Heavy Strikes, Slow, Gravity Well)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A relentless close-range bruiser who amplifies gravity on a single target, stacking crushing debuffs until the enemy is pinned and pulverized.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Gravitic Slam      | Attack   | Smash the ground with amplified gravity; deals heavy damage in a small AoE and applies Weighty (reduces target move speed 15%) for 4s
  - Mass Amplifier     | Passive  | Every melee hit you land increases the target's effective weight; after 3 stacks, they become Sluggish (cannot dash/jump) for 3s
  - Crushing Aura      | Aura     | Passively emit low-level gravitational pressure; enemies within 5m deal 8% reduced attack speed due to increased limb mass

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Collapse Strike    | Attack   | Wind up a 1.5s channeled punch that deals 250% weapon damage; if target is Sluggish, deal an additional 100% damage and knock them prone
  - Gravity Anchor     | Debuff   | Lock a target's position in place for 2.5s — they cannot move but can still act; perfect setup for Crush combos
