ARCHETYPE C: SPECTRAL ARSENAL (Summon Ghost Weapons)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Manifests spectral copies of the cursed blade as phantom weapons that orbit, defend, and attack alongside the wielder — a ghostly armory that fights on its own while the Hexblade focuses elsewhere.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Spectral Blade      | Summon   | Summon 1 spectral blade that orbits you and attacks nearby enemies once per 3s; deals moderate damage and ignores physical armor
  - Phantom Strike      | Active   | Command all active spectral blades to simultaneously strike the same target; damage scales with number of blades (each blade fires once)
  - Ethereal Steel      | Passive  | Spectral blades last indefinitely while you remain in combat; they are dismissed if you sheathe your real weapon or fall below 20% HP

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Arsenal Expansion   | Summon   | Summon 2 additional spectral blades (max 5 total orbiting blades); they orbit faster with more blades present
  - Shield Formation    | Active   | Command spectral blades to defensive formation for 6s; they intercept incoming attacks (absorb up to 3 hits total before returning to offense)
  - Spectral Surge      | Active   | Trigger a surge — all spectral blades immediately fire at a target in rapid sequence over 1s, dealing their individual damage per blade

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Ghost Lance         | Summon   | Summon a unique spectral lance that fires a penetrating beam attack every 6s instead of a regular blade strike; the beam passes through all enemies in a line
  - Haunted Volley      | Active   | Launch all spectral blades outward in different directions simultaneously; each blade passes through all enemies in its path before circling back — AoE coverage
  - Spectral Bonding    | Passive/Heal  | Each spectral blade heals you for 2 HP per attack it makes independently; a full arsenal of 5 blades passively sustains you through continuous spectral strikes

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Blade Tornado       | Active   | Command all spectral blades to begin spinning rapidly around you for 6s; any enemy who comes within 5m takes continuous spectral damage from the whirling barrier
  - Spectral Clone      | Summon   | Summon a full spectral duplicate of your entire arsenal at a remote location for 8s; the duplicate fights independently at the target location while your primary arsenal continues fighting near you

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Ghost Armory    | Summon   | For 15s, unlock the full Spectral Arsenal — summon 10 spectral blades simultaneously (double the normal max), they split into groups of 3 to independently hunt different targets, Blade Tornado's radius expands to 8m and deals triple damage, and once per 3s a spectral greatsword manifests to deliver a powerful area cleave across the entire battlefield

################################################################################
CLASS 28: WILD SHAPER (Shapeshifter)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A primal shapeshifter who does not merely don an animal form but completely becomes something else — trading their humanity for the advantages of predator, titan, or swarm with each transformation reshaping their entire combat identity. They are all creatures and no creature, limited only by the forms they have learned and the will to use them.

ARCHETYPE A: PREDATOR FORM (Agile DPS Forms)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Cycles between fast, aggressive animal forms that each have unique combo mechanics — learning to chain forms together for transition bonuses makes each shift a tactical decision rather than a reset.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Wolf Form           | Transform| Shift into a wolf; gain 20% movement speed, a Bite attack (applies Bleed), and a Trip attack (brief knockdown on next hit); duration unlimited in combat
  - Form Transition     | Passive  | When you shift from one Predator Form to another, deal a brief burst of transition damage based on the form you are leaving (Wolf burst = slash, etc.)
  - Predator Instincts  | Passive  | In any Predator Form, gain 10% crit chance and the ability to detect stealthed enemies through scent within 8m

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Panther Form        | Transform| Shift into a panther; gain permanent Stealth while stationary, a Pounce charge attack (high damage opener), and Raking Claws (rapid multi-hit combo)
  - Falcon Form         | Transform| Shift into a falcon; gain flight, a Dive Bomb attack (massive single-target damage from above), and aerial maneuverability that makes you nearly impossible to hit with ground attacks
  - Hunter's Flow       | Passive  | Each kill in a Predator Form generates 1 Flow stack (max 5); each stack increases your transition damage by 20% and reduces form shift cooldown by 1s

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Viper Form          | Transform| Shift into a viper; gain a fast Fang Strike applying stacking Venom (escalating poison DoT), a Constrict CC (wrap target, immobilizing for 3s), and Shed Skin (remove all debuffs once per form)
  - Hybrid Step         | Active   | Briefly merge two form traits for 4s without fully committing to either; gain one ability from a second form while maintaining your current form (e.g., Wolf + Falcon = wolf body with flight for 4s)
  - Kill Frenzy         | Passive  | At max Flow stacks (5), enter a kill frenzy — all Predator Form attacks deal 30% bonus damage and form transitions are instant (no animation delay)

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Apex Predator Shift | Transform| Shift into a unique Apex form that combines the best traits of all Predator Forms learned — wolf speed, panther stealth, falcon flight, viper venom, all at 80% effectiveness simultaneously; duration 12s
  - Perfect Hunt        | Active   | Identify a target as Hunted Prey; for 8s you track them flawlessly, all attacks against them deal 30% bonus damage, and gap-closing abilities reset if the Prey moves away

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Primal Rush     | Active   | For 15s, shift continuously through all Predator Forms every 3s automatically; each transition deals full transition damage to all nearby enemies, you gain all passive bonuses of all forms simultaneously, and each 3s window allows you to use that form's strongest ability once for free

>> Your notes on Predator Form:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: BEHEMOTH FORM (Tank / Giant Forms)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Transforms into enormous, powerful creatures that sacrifice speed for overwhelming physical presence — each Behemoth form changes the tactical role to area denial, crowd control, and unstoppable charges.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Bear Form           | Transform| Shift into a large bear; gain 30% bonus HP, a heavy Maul attack (high damage, knockback), and Thick Hide (15% physical damage reduction)
  - Behemoth Passive    | Passive/Immunity  | In any Behemoth Form, gain immunity to knockback and all CC durations are reduced by 30% from the sheer physical mass
  - Ground Pound        | Attack   | Available in any Behemoth Form; slam the ground creating a shockwave that knocks nearby enemies prone and deals area damage

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Rhino Form          | Transform| Shift into a rhinoceros; gain a devastating Charge ability (dash 12m dealing enormous damage to first target hit and knocking them back), Horned Gore (armor-piercing strike), and 25% bonus HP
  - Gorilla Form        | Transform| Shift into a giant gorilla; gain two independent arm attack combos, a Chest Thump that Fears nearby enemies for 2s, and the ability to throw large objects as ranged attacks
  - Behemoth Roar       | Active   | In any Behemoth Form, let out a terrifying roar — all enemies within 10m are Feared for 2s and Deafened (reduced action effectiveness) for an additional 3s

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Elephant Form       | Transform| Shift into a massive elephant; gain Stampede (charge through multiple enemies, damaging all), Trunk Grab (throw an enemy 8m), and the largest HP pool of any form (+50% max HP)
  - Behemoth Endurance  | Passive/Defense  | While in Behemoth Form below 30% HP, gain a 30% damage bonus and 20% additional damage reduction from desperate fighting instincts
  - Size Advantage      | Passive/Defense  | In Behemoth Forms, enemies suffer a Fear-light effect (10% miss chance, -10% damage) simply from proximity to your massive form

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Ancient Form        | Transform| Shift into a legendary prehistoric megafauna; gain access to all Behemoth attacks, 75% bonus HP, and a tremor stomp (large-radius ground shockwave that briefly immobilizes all enemies in 12m)
  - Unstoppable Charge  | Passive/Immunity  | Charge abilities in Behemoth Forms cannot be stopped by any CC effect; you continue moving through roots, stuns, and knockbacks during a charge

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Titan Awakens   | Transform| For 20s, ascend to Titan Form — your size triples, you gain the combined HP bonus of all Behemoth Forms simultaneously, Ground Pound's radius expands to 15m, you can grab and throw enemies as if they are toys (dealing damage), and any Behemoth charge becomes a battlefield-crossing assault that deals damage to every enemy you pass through

>> Your notes on Behemoth Form:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE C: SWARM FORM (Become Many Small Creatures)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Dissolves into a swarm of small creatures (insects, bats, rats) — losing conventional single-target fighting ability but gaining complete coverage, terrain bypass, and the ability to be in multiple places simultaneously.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Insect Swarm        | Transform| Dissolve into a cloud of biting insects; spread across a 5m area, cannot be targeted by single-target attacks, deal ongoing swarm damage to all enemies in your area
  - Swarm Cohesion      | Passive/Immunity  | While in Swarm Form you are immune to physical attacks but take 30% more damage from AoE spells; the swarm is resilient to individual strikes but vulnerable to fire and wide effects
  - Reconstitute        | Active   | In Swarm Form, collapse back to humanoid form at any point within your current spread area; arrive in a burst of creatures dealing light damage to adjacent enemies

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Bat Swarm           | Transform| Dissolve into a swarm of bats; gain flight, echolocation (perfect sight in darkness), and Drain (siphon HP from enemies touched, healing each bat individually)
  - Swarm Split         | Active   | In Swarm Form, deliberately split into 2 separate swarms that act independently — one holds a target while the other flanks; must reconstitute to reunify
  - Engulf              | Active   | While in Swarm Form, completely engulf a single target; they cannot attack outward (the swarm is everywhere), and take swarm damage every 0.3s for 4s while Blinded by the swarm covering their face

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Rat Tide            | Transform| Dissolve into a tide of rats; gain low profile (cannot be hit by attacks above ground level), gnawing Armor Erosion on all contacted enemies, and the ability to fit through any opening larger than 1 inch
  - Swarm Intelligence  | Passive  | The swarm acts as a distributed intelligence; you gain awareness of all enemies and allies within 15m without needing line of sight, as individual units are spread throughout the area
  - Parasite Form       | Active   | While in Swarm Form, send a subset of the swarm to infest a target enemy; they carry 10% of the swarm inside them, dealing internal damage (bypasses armor) for 6s and providing you with their exact location permanently

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Total Dissolution   | Transform| Dissolve completely and spread across the entire battlefield; you are everywhere and cannot be targeted for 4s, deal damage to all enemies simultaneously, then reconstitute at any point of your choice
  - Overwhelming Swarm  | Active   | Concentrate the entire swarm onto a single target for 5s; deal damage equivalent to 6% of their max HP per second as the undivided swarm devours them

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Plague Tide     | Active   | For 15s, achieve maximum swarm saturation — you exist as billions of creatures simultaneously across the entire battlefield; all enemies are continuously being bitten and swarmed (2% max HP damage per second), engulf affects the 3 nearest enemies simultaneously, you cannot be targeted or damaged by single-target effects, and reconstituting deals damage in a 10m burst as the swarm explosively collapses back to humanoid form

>> Your notes on Swarm Form:
>>
>>

################################################################################
CLASS 29: QUANTUM GHOST (Phase / Dimension Sci-fi)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A soldier who has been partially destroyed and partially recreated by a dimensional accident, leaving them perpetually flickering between the real and the unreal. They are never fully present, never fully absent, and have learned to weaponize the fundamental uncertainty of their own existence against anyone unlucky enough to need to hit them.

ARCHETYPE A: PHASE SHIFT (Intangibility / Dodge)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Cycles between Phased (intangible) and Solid states, building Phase Energy to fuel longer periods of intangibility while using brief solid moments to deliver attacks that cannot be intercepted.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Phase In/Out        | Toggle   | Toggle between Solid and Phased states; Phased = immune to physical attacks but cannot deal physical damage; Solid = normal combat
  - Ghost Strike        | Attack   | Strike while transitioning from Phased to Solid; deal bonus damage equal to 20% for the momentum of materialization
  - Phase Energy        | Passive  | Generate 1 Phase Energy per second while Phased (max 20); spend Phase Energy on enhanced abilities

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Phase Dash          | Movement | Spend 3 Phase Energy; dash 10m while intangible, passing through all obstacles, then rematerialize — any enemy in your rematerialization point takes impact damage
  - Selective Phasing   | Passive/Utility  | While Phased, you can choose to selectively interact with specific objects or enemies (reach through walls to grab an item, touch one enemy while remaining intangible to others)
  - Phase Burst         | Attack   | Spend 5 Phase Energy; rapidly phase in and out 5 times in 1s while melee attacking — each phase transition hits once, 5 total hits, each from a slightly different angle

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Extended Phase      | Passive/Utility  | Phase Energy now allows extended phasing — while Phased, each second costs 1 Phase Energy instead of only generating it; you can sustain long intangible windows at the cost of resource
  - Phase Anchor        | Active   | Plant an anchor in a location while Solid; spend 4 Phase Energy to instantly return to that exact position from anywhere in range (8m) — repositioning without moving through space
  - Spectral Ambush     | Attack   | Spend 6 Phase Energy; remain Phased while delivering a single attack that is channeled through dimensional space — the attack still deals full damage from a Phased state (bypasses the normal damage restriction)

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Phase Storm         | Active   | Spend 12 Phase Energy; enter a 6s state of rapid phase cycling — pass through 6 enemies in sequence dealing damage to each from materialization impact, then return to origin Phased and immune
  - Dimensional Anchor  | Passive  | Enemies who attack you while Solid have a 20% chance to become partially Phased themselves for 2s (cannot interact with terrain or use physical attacks) as your quantum state is contagious

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Perfect Ghost       | Active   | For 15s, achieve perfect quantum intangibility — remain Phased indefinitely without Phase Energy cost, deal physical damage freely while Phased (the limitation is removed), and any attack that would have hit you passes through harmlessly while dealing 20% damage to the attacker from dimensional feedback

>> Your notes on Phase Shift:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: SUPERPOSITION (Exist in Two Places)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Maintains two simultaneous positions through quantum superposition — a Primary position and a Ghost position; abilities can be triggered from either location, allowing impossible angles and simultaneous dual-point attacks.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Bifurcate           | Active   | Split into two quantum states simultaneously; your Primary (physical) location and a Ghost position up to 10m away; Ghost attacks deal 50% damage but require no physical movement
  - Quantum Choice      | Passive  | When attacking from Superposition, enemies must choose which version of you to defend against — they take 10% more damage from the direction they do not guard (automatic if they only have a frontal defense)
  - Collapse Wave       | Active   | Collapse both positions into one, dealing a shockwave of quantum collapse energy at both locations simultaneously; brief AoE damage at both points

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Ghost Flank         | Attack   | Attack from Ghost position while your Primary is elsewhere; target takes damage from an impossible angle and cannot retaliate against the Ghost
  - Position Swap       | Active   | Instantly swap your Primary and Ghost positions; use this to teleport to the Ghost location while the Ghost becomes the anchor — unlimited repositioning tool
  - Resonant Doubles    | Passive  | When both your Primary and Ghost deal damage to the same target within 1s, that target takes a resonance burst of additional quantum damage equal to 20% of both hits combined

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Triple State        | Active   | Briefly exist in three simultaneous positions for 4s (Primary + 2 Ghosts); the third position deals 30% damage but having three angles of attack creates enormous defensive confusion for enemies
  - Quantum Entrapment  | Active   | Position your Primary and a Ghost on opposite sides of an enemy; any attack they make is simultaneously countered by the position they are not facing — applies Confused (20% miss chance) for 6s
  - Observer Effect     | Passive  | Any enemy who attacks your Ghost position is exposed — you know their exact attack pattern for 3s, gaining 15% bonus damage against them

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Quantum Blitz       | Active   | For 6s, your Ghost position moves freely and attacks autonomously while your Primary acts normally — effectively doubling your action economy for the duration
  - Decoherence Wave    | Active   | Collapse all superposition simultaneously in a controlled decoherence; deal damage at every position you have occupied in the last 4s (traces of quantum positions release energy on collapse)

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Infinite Superposition | Active | For 10s, exist in unlimited superposition — up to 8 simultaneous Ghost positions, each dealing 40% damage autonomously, while your Primary deals full damage; all positions can trigger Resonant Doubles with each other creating a cascade of resonance bursts; enemies effectively cannot prioritize a target as every angle is covered

>> Your notes on Superposition:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE C: ENTANGLEMENT (Link Targets)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Quantum-entangles enemies and allies together so that events affecting one instantly affect the other — a support/control archetype that exploits quantum mechanics' non-locality to chain consequences across the battlefield.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Quantum Link        | Active   | Entangle two targets (can be enemy-enemy, ally-ally, or enemy-ally); 30% of effects applied to one are mirrored in the other at 30% effectiveness
  - Observe and Exploit | Passive  | Linked enemies take 10% bonus damage from you as your quantum observation of their state creates vulnerabilities in their probability field
  - Entanglement Web    | Passive  | You can maintain up to 3 active Quantum Links simultaneously; additional links cost 2x mana

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Damage Mirror       | Active   | Establish a damage-mirror link between two enemies for 8s; 50% of damage dealt to either is also dealt to the other (neither takes reduced damage — both take their normal damage plus 50% mirroring)
  - Heal Chain          | Buff/Heal   | Entangle two allies; healing applied to either is split 50/50 between both — efficient for group healing, especially when healing is applied to the healthier one
  - Quantum Collapse    | Active   | Forcibly collapse a Quantum Link; the link detonates, dealing burst damage to both linked targets equal to 20% of each target's missing HP at time of collapse

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Fate Link           | Active   | Entangle an enemy with themselves (paradoxical quantum state); for 6s their actions have a 25% chance to be perfectly reversed (moving right = moving left, attacking A = attacking B)
  - Network Entanglement| Active   | Link 4 enemies into a quantum network; any CC effect applied to one immediately applies at 60% to all others in the network
  - Resonance Cascade   | Passive  | When a Quantum Link collapses (by ability or expiry), all other active links gain 10% strength for 5s from the resonance wave

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Quantum Transposition| Active  | Swap the positions of any two entangled targets instantly (regardless of distance within 30m); both targets take brief disorientation damage from the spatial swap
  - Entanglement Storm  | Active   | For 8s, create a quantum storm — establish links between every enemy on the battlefield in a complete mesh network; every debuff applied to any enemy propagates at 40% to all other enemies simultaneously

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Universal Entanglement | Active | For 12s, entangle everything on the battlefield with everything else — all enemies are linked to all other enemies, all allies share 20% of healing received with each other, all damage applied anywhere propagates at 25% to all other enemies, and once per 3s trigger a simultaneous Quantum Collapse on all existing links, dealing burst damage across the entire entangled network simultaneously

################################################################################
CLASS 30: Chrono-Engineer (Sci-fi Time Tech)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A brilliant technologist who has reverse-engineered the fabric of time itself, wielding
experimental devices that freeze moments, rewind catastrophes, and sculpt the flow of seconds into
a weapon of war.

ARCHETYPE A: Stasis Field (Freeze, Suspend, Lockdown)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A control specialist who encases enemies and objects in temporal bubbles, halting their
existence mid-action while allies maneuver freely around them.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Cryo-Pulse         | CC       | Fire a stasis bolt that immobilizes one target for 2 seconds; deals no damage but resets cooldown if target was already debuffed.
  - Temporal Brace     | Passive  | Enemies you immobilize take 15% increased damage from all sources while frozen.
  - Pocket Stasis      | Utility  | Place a small stasis field on an object or projectile mid-flight, suspending it harmlessly in place for 5 seconds.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Field Generator    | Active   | Deploy a device that creates a 4m stasis zone; enemies entering it are slowed 60% and cannot use active skills.
  - Flash Freeze       | CC       | Instantly freeze all enemies in a 3m cone for 1.5 seconds; frozen enemies shatter for bonus damage if hit with a heavy attack.
  - Suspended Sentence | Passive  | Each second an enemy spends in stasis causes them to take a stacking 5% damage penalty when they unfreeze (max 50%).

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Cascade Lock       | CC       | Freeze one target; if that target is struck while frozen, the stasis cascades to up to 2 nearby enemies within 5m.
  - Overclock Stasis   | Active   | Overcharge your stasis generator for 8 seconds, reducing all stasis cooldowns by 50% but draining 2% max HP per second.
  - Temporal Cage      | Channel  | Channel for 1.5 seconds to encase a target in a full stasis bubble for 6 seconds; the target is invulnerable but completely locked — usable offensively or defensively.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Null Moment        | Active   | Emit a pulse that freezes ALL entities in a 10m radius — allies included — for 3 seconds; you alone remain mobile and can act freely during this window.
  - Cryo-Lattice Web   | Aura     | Passive aura: enemies that move within 3m of you have a 25% chance to be flash-frozen for 0.5 seconds; this chance doubles if they are already debuffed.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Absolute Zero Hour | Active   | Detonate your stasis core to freeze everything on the battlefield for 5 seconds except yourself; frozen enemies take a massive damage hit when time resumes, proportional to the number of seconds they were suspended (max 500% weapon damage per target).

>> Your notes on Stasis Field:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Temporal Anchor (Save, Restore, Rewind)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A resilient strategist who plants temporal checkpoints in time, rewinding personal or
ally states, reversing debuffs, and weaponizing the past as a second chance engine.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Anchor Point       | Active   | Mark your current HP, position, and active buffs; activate again within 6 seconds to snap back to that exact state.
  - Echo Imprint       | Passive  | Each time you use a skill, store its last-used instance; once per 20 seconds, replay the stored skill instantly at no cost.
  - Temporal Patch     | Heal     | Rewind a minor wound, restoring 10% max HP by pulling your body's state back 1 second.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Ally Anchor        | Active   | Place an anchor on a willing ally; activate to restore that ally to their state from 5 seconds ago (HP, position, active debuffs removed).
  - Rewind Debuff      | Cleanse  | Reverse a debuff on yourself or an ally by rewinding its application; the debuff is removed and the source enemy briefly loses 10% of the debuff's power turned back at them.
  - Chronicle Buffer   | Passive/Heal  | You passively record the last 8 seconds of your state; when your HP drops below 20%, automatically trigger a rewind to 4 seconds ago (60-second cooldown).

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Phase Recall       | Movement | Teleport back to your position from 3 seconds ago, leaving an afterimage that absorbs one hit before fading.
  - History Rewritten  | Active   | Target an enemy and rewind their buffs, removing all buffs applied in the last 6 seconds and stunning them for 1 second from temporal disorientation.
  - Paradox Insurance  | Passive/Defense  | Once per combat, if a killing blow would reduce you to 0 HP, automatically activate your most recently set Anchor Point instead of dying.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Temporal Overwrite | Active   | Rewind yourself and up to 2 allies simultaneously to states from 6 seconds ago; all three subjects regain HP, lose debuffs, and return to prior positions.
  - Causality Engine   | Toggle   | Toggle on: begin recording a 10-second loop; toggle off to replay the entire loop — all damage dealt during the loop is re-applied instantaneously to targets; you do not replay movement.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Grand Erasure      | Active   | Choose a point in the last 12 seconds and rewind the entire battlefield to that moment — all HP values, positions, and buff/debuff states reset to what they were at that timestamp; you retain full memory and cooldowns from the present; 120-second cooldown.

ARCHETYPE C: Dilation Matrix (Speed, Slow, Zone Control)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A battlefield manipulator who sculpts localized time fields to accelerate allies and
brutally decelerate enemies, turning tempo itself into the decisive weapon.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Lag Field          | Debuff   | Project a 3m slow zone for 5 seconds; enemies inside move and attack 35% slower.
  - Quickstep Protocol | Buff/Movement     | Grant yourself or one ally a 20% movement and attack speed boost for 6 seconds.
  - Temporal Static    | Passive/Defense  | Enemies slowed by your abilities deal 10% less damage while affected.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Dilation Lens      | Active   | Deploy a hovering device that creates a persistent 5m dilation zone; enemies inside are slowed 45%, allies inside gain 20% haste; lasts 12 seconds.
  - Overclock Ally     | Buff     | Supercharge one ally's personal timeline for 5 seconds: they gain an extra action every 2 seconds (cannot move during bonus actions).
  - Time Drag          | Debuff   | Fire a tether at one enemy; they drag a temporal anchor for 8 seconds, slowing them 25% and causing their ability cooldowns to tick 50% slower.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Bullet Time Bubble | Active   | Slow all projectiles and fast-moving attacks in a 6m radius to near-standstill for 3 seconds; ranged attacks can be physically dodged during this window.
  - Haste Matrix       | Buff/Movement     | Blanket up to 3 allies in a speed matrix for 10 seconds: +30% attack speed, +20% move speed, and cooldown reductions of 1 second per skill used.
  - Dead Zone          | Aura     | Enemies within 4m of you are perpetually slowed 20%; this stacks with other dilation effects.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Paradox Sprint     | Movement | Briefly enter a personally accelerated state for 4 seconds: you move at 300% speed, attacks trigger twice, and incoming attacks are slowed so they connect at half effectiveness.
  - Differential Field | Active   | Split the battlefield into two time zones for 8 seconds — allies gain +40% haste in one zone, enemies suffer -40% speed in the other; zone boundary is a visible line you draw at cast time.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Omega Dilation     | Channel  | Channel for 2 seconds, then release a full battlefield temporal shockwave: all enemies are slowed 80% for 8 seconds while all allies gain 80% haste for 8 seconds; the contrast between zones causes enemies to take amplified damage from all hasted ally attacks (+50% per hit) for the duration.

################################################################################
CLASS 31: Magnetist (Metal/Magnetism)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A master of electromagnetic force who bends iron and steel to their will, hurling
shrapnel like storms, charging projectiles to railgun velocities, and weaving magnetic fields into
living shields of repulsion and attraction.

ARCHETYPE A: Ferrokinesis (Metal Manipulation, Shrapnel, Pull/Push)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A raw-force melee-to-ranged hybrid who tears metal from the environment and enemies,
shaping it into weapons, debris storms, and bone-crushing projectiles on the fly.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Iron Rend          | Attack   | Magnetically rip metal fragments from a target's armor or nearby environment, dealing damage and reducing their armor by 5% for 8 seconds (stacks 3x).
  - Scrap Volley       | Attack   | Launch 5 metal shards in a spread cone; each shard deals light damage and has a 20% chance to pierce through to a second target.
  - Magnetic Grip      | CC       | Magnetize a metal-wearing enemy, rooting them to the ground for 2 seconds as you pull their armor against their own body.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Shrapnel Cloud     | Active   | Detonate a cluster of metal debris in a 5m radius, dealing moderate damage and applying a bleeding laceration that deals damage over 4 seconds.
  - Ferrous Anchor     | CC       | Fire a heavy bolt of magnetized iron that pins an enemy to a wall or the ground for 3 seconds; deals bonus damage if target is wearing metal armor.
  - Orbital Debris     | Toggle   | Toggle on: orbit 3 metal shards around yourself; each shard intercepts one incoming melee attack (absorbs hit), then returns to orbit; shards can be launched as projectiles at any time.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Ironveil Torrent   | Channel  | Channel for 2 seconds to summon a roaring storm of metal debris in a 6m cone, dealing continuous heavy damage and reducing enemy movement by 40%.
  - Mass Convergence   | Active   | Pull all loose metal objects and metal-armored enemies within 12m toward a single focal point, crushing them together for massive impact damage.
  - Living Blade       | Active   | Animate a large metal object (sword, beam, door) and wield it as a remote-controlled weapon for 10 seconds; attacks with it deal 200% weapon damage.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Ferrokinetic Surge | Active   | Temporarily amplify your magnetic field so that ALL metal in a 15m radius becomes a weapon; for 6 seconds, every movement by an enemy in range causes ambient shrapnel to slash them for small but stacking damage.
  - Polarized Eruption | Attack   | Charge both hands with opposite magnetic poles and slam them together, creating an explosive magnetic shockwave that launches all nearby metal objects outward at lethal velocity; deals massive AoE damage in a 8m radius.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Iron Tyrant's Reign | Active  | For 10 seconds, become the nexus of all metal on the battlefield — pull all loose metal, enemy weapons, and armor pieces toward you in a 20m radius, forming a colossal suit of magnetic plate armor (+50% defense, +100% damage) while enemies are disarmed and lacerated by their own ripped-away gear; at the end, explode the construct outward dealing catastrophic AoE damage.

>>

ARCHETYPE B: Railgun (Charged Projectile, Penetration, Burst)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A high-damage marksman who charges electromagnetic coils to fire devastating pinpoint
shots that penetrate lines of enemies, walls, and armor with surgical lethality.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Coil Shot          | Attack   | Fire a basic railgun slug at high velocity; deals moderate damage with minor armor penetration (10%).
  - Charge Capacitor   | Passive  | Each second you spend not firing increases your next shot's damage by 8% (max 5 stacks, stacks reset on firing).
  - Slug Punch         | Attack   | Fire a blunt magnetic slug that deals reduced damage but knocks the target back 4m.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Piercing Round     | Attack   | Fire a hardened ferrous slug that passes through up to 3 targets in a line; each subsequent target takes 15% more damage than the last.
  - Overcharge         | Active   | Spend 3 seconds charging your railgun to max power; the resulting shot deals 400% weapon damage and punches through walls and obstacles up to 2m thick.
  - Mag-Lock Stance    | Stance   | Plant your feet magnetically to the ground, immobilizing yourself but increasing your railgun damage by 30% and eliminating all recoil and spread for 8 seconds.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - EMP Round          | Attack   | Fire an electromagnetic pulse slug; deals moderate damage and disables one mechanical or tech-enhanced target (silences tech skills) for 4 seconds.
  - Ricochet Protocol  | Passive  | Your railgun slugs now bounce off metal surfaces once; the ricocheted shot deals 75% of original damage and can hit a different target.
  - Capacitor Dump     | Active   | Release all stored Charge Capacitor stacks simultaneously as a single explosive shot; at 5 stacks this deals 400% damage with a 3m burst radius at impact.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Armor Splitter     | Attack   | Fire a specialized slug that reduces target's physical defense by 40% for 10 seconds; if the target has already had armor reduced, this instead deals a catastrophic armor-shatter that removes all physical defense temporarily.
  - Twin Rail          | Active   | For 6 seconds, fire from two simultaneously charged rails; every shot fires a double-burst, both slugs tracking slight magnetic divergence to hit two separate targets or converge for double damage on one.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Gauss Obliterator  | Channel  | Charge for 3 seconds, building to critical magnetic pressure, then fire an annihilating beam of supercharged iron plasma that travels infinitely in a straight line — dealing 800% weapon damage to the first target, 600% to the second, 400% to the third, and stunning every target hit for 3 seconds; the beam punches through any obstacle.

ARCHETYPE C: Polarity Shield (Magnetic Defense, Repulsion, Absorption)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A reactive tank who weaponizes magnetism defensively, repelling attacks, redirecting
projectiles back at attackers, and creating force fields that punish aggression.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Repulsor Plate     | Buff/Defense     | Generate a magnetic field around yourself for 6 seconds that deflects the first ranged attack back at the shooter for 50% damage.
  - Iron Skin Charge   | Passive/Utility  | Passively absorb trace metal from strikes; gain 1 Iron Charge per hit received (max 10); Iron Charges can be spent on active skills.
  - Magnetic Aegis     | Active/Shield   | Spend 3 Iron Charges to create a personal shield bubble absorbing 200 damage for 4 seconds.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Polarity Swap      | Reactive | Trigger when hit by a metal weapon: magnetically reverse the weapon's polarity, knocking it (and the attacker) back 5m and dealing the weapon's damage back to them.
  - Ferrous Barrier    | Active/Defense   | Raise a wall of magnetized metal debris in a 5m line; the wall blocks projectiles and slows enemies who pass through it by 50%; lasts 8 seconds.
  - Charge Siphon      | Passive/Utility  | Whenever an enemy within 6m uses a metal weapon or metal-based skill, you automatically gain 2 Iron Charges.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Lodestone Aura     | Aura     | Continuously attract metal projectiles and shrapnel toward yourself (absorbing ranged attacks for allies within 5m) while radiating a repulsion field that pushes melee attackers back 2m on contact.
  - Polarity Reversal  | Active   | Spend 5 Iron Charges to instantly reverse the magnetic polarity of your field; for 4 seconds all metal-based attacks aimed at you instead home toward the nearest enemy.
  - Fortress Shell     | Active/Shield   | Consume all Iron Charges to create a massive personal barrier; each Iron Charge consumed adds 150 damage absorption; can stack to absorb up to 1,500 damage.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Magnetic Singularity | Active | Spend 8 Iron Charges to create a pulling singularity point at a target location: all metal objects and metal-armored enemies within 10m are yanked toward it and crushed together, dealing heavy damage and stunning them for 2 seconds.
  - Reactive Lattice   | Reactive  | Your shields and barriers now actively respond to hits — each time a shielded hit is absorbed, release a 3m pulse that deals 50 damage and slows nearby enemies 25% for 2 seconds.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Polar Citadel      | Transform| For 12 seconds, become a living magnetic fortress: surround yourself with a rotating shell of torn metal that absorbs unlimited ranged damage and reflects 75% of absorbed damage back as AoE pulses, while your repulsion field knocks back melee attackers every second and your Iron Charge generation doubles; at the end, the shell collapses in a devastating 360-degree shrapnel explosion.

################################################################################
CLASS 32: Demonbinder (Demon Pacts)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A mortal who has walked through hellfire and emerged with chains wrapped around the
wrists of ancient demons — not enslaved to them, but commanding them, wearing their power like
armor while knowing one misstep surrenders the soul.

ARCHETYPE A: Possession (Channel Demon Power Into Self, Transformation, Risk)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A volatile self-transformer who invites demonic spirits directly into their body,
gaining monstrous power at the cost of control, sanity, and health.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Ember Vessel       | Buff/Risk     | Invoke a minor fire-demon for 6 seconds; your attacks deal bonus fire damage but you take 2% max HP per second from the internal heat.
  - Demonic Reflex     | Passive/Defense  | While any demon is channeled through you, gain 15% increased attack speed and 10% damage reduction as infernal ichor hardens your skin.
  - Banish Passenger   | Active   | Forcibly expel a channeled demon from your body, dealing moderate AoE damage as it erupts outward; removes all possession debuffs immediately.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Second Skin        | Transform| Partially merge with a flesh-demon for 8 seconds: gain +25% max HP temporarily, your unarmed attacks deal heavy physical damage, and you cannot use items or spells — only brutal melee.
  - Hellsight          | Buff     | Channel a divination-demon through your eyes for 5 seconds; see through walls and all stealth effects, and your next attack deals 200% damage as the demon marks weakpoints.
  - Soul Overflow      | Reactive  | When your possession skill expires, excess demonic energy discharges as a fire burst in a 4m radius dealing moderate damage to nearby enemies.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Legion Mask        | Transform| Wear the face of a demon lord for 10 seconds: your damage type converts to pure hellfire, fear all enemies within 5m at start, and gain immunity to crowd control — but at the end, take 20% max HP as backlash damage.
  - Infernal Marrow    | Reactive  | Each time you take damage while possessed, 30% of that damage is stored; when possession ends, release stored damage as a single retaliatory burst against your last attacker.
  - Pact of Blood      | Active   | Willingly sacrifice 25% of your current HP to summon a more powerful demon for the next possession, increasing all possession skill bonuses by 50% for the next cast.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - True Merger        | Transform| Fully merge with a high-ranking demon for 12 seconds: become a demonic avatar with 200% damage, flight capability, and all resistances at 50% — but you lose access to all non-demonic abilities and take 5% max HP per second throughout; at the end, if you survive, gain a permanent minor demonic trait.
  - Demonic Resonance  | Passive  | Each different demon you channel in a single combat session increases the power of all subsequent channeling by 10% (max 50%); the bonus resets between combats.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Hellborn Apotheosis| Transform| Abandon your mortal shell entirely for 15 seconds, becoming a demonic god — all stats double, you gain new devastating demonic abilities replacing your normal kit, and you are immune to all damage for the first 3 seconds; however, if you die during this form, you cannot be resurrected and your soul is forfeit; if you survive, you return to mortal form with all cooldowns reset.

>> Your notes on Possession:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Infernal Court (Demon Summons, Hierarchy, Command)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A dark general who maintains a hierarchy of bound demons — from grunts to archdemons —
issuing commands and building a layered demonic army with synergistic hell-court bonuses.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Imp Binding        | Summon   | Bind a weak Imp that attacks enemies with fire-claws; the Imp deals low damage but grants you 1 Court Token when it scores a kill.
  - Hellpact Contract  | Passive  | Each bound demon passively increases your fire damage by 5%; this bonus stacks per demon active.
  - Dismiss Minion     | Active   | Detonate a bound demon, converting its remaining HP into a fire explosion equal to 150% of its current health.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Shade Tyrant       | Summon   | Summon a mid-rank shadow demon that prioritizes high-value targets, dealing moderate shadow damage; costs 2 Court Tokens to summon.
  - Demon Drill        | Active   | Command all bound demons to focus a single target simultaneously; for 4 seconds every bound demon ignores other threats and deals 150% damage to the chosen target.
  - Infernal Chain     | CC       | Bind two demons and an enemy together in an infernal chain; the enemy is rooted as long as both demons live, and if either demon is killed the chain shatters dealing burst damage.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Balor Lieutenant   | Summon   | Spend 4 Court Tokens to summon a powerful Balor-class demon with heavy melee attacks, fire wings (can fly), and a passive intimidation aura that reduces nearby enemy attack speed 20%.
  - Court Hierarchy    | Passive  | If you have at least 3 different demon types active simultaneously, all demons gain +30% damage and +50% HP; this bonus collapses if any type falls below one representative.
  - Soul Farm          | Passive/Heal  | When any of your demons kills an enemy, gain 1 Court Token and restore 5% of your max HP; demon kills with the Dismiss Minion explosion also qualify.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Archdemon Pact     | Summon   | Spend 6 Court Tokens to summon a singular Archdemon that commands all your other demons, increasing their damage by 50% and HP by 75%; the Archdemon itself deals massive damage and can unleash a once-per-combat hellfire breath hitting all enemies.
  - Hell Court Decree  | Active   | Issue a royal decree to all bound demons: choose one — Rampage (all demons charge freely dealing 200% damage for 6 seconds), Sacrifice (instantly kill all demons to heal you for 10% max HP per demon), or Formation (all demons form a defensive ring around you absorbing attacks).

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Open the Hellgate  | Summon   | Tear open a permanent gateway to the infernal plane for 20 seconds; a continuous stream of demons pours through the gate, spawning a random demon every 2 seconds; all spawned demons are empowered (+50% stats), and your Court Token generation doubles; when the gate closes, all gate-spawned demons detonate for their full HP as fire damage.

>> Your notes on Infernal Court:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE C: Bargainer (Gamble Power for Risk, Deals, Wildcards)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A high-risk devil's advocate who constantly negotiates power from demons at steep costs,
gambling HP, skills, and fate itself to pull game-changing effects from uncertain pacts.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Devil's Ante       | Active   | Offer 10% of your max HP to a demon in exchange for a random buff lasting 8 seconds (possible: +30% damage, +30% speed, immunity to one damage type, or invisibility).
  - Fine Print         | Passive/Utility  | Whenever a bargain goes in your favor (you receive a buff you needed), the demon is briefly impressed — reduce your next bargain's HP cost by 5%.
  - Renegotiate        | Active   | Reroll the effect of any currently active bargain buff; the new result is random but you do not pay additional HP cost.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Blood Clause       | Active   | Offer 20% of your current HP to roll two random combat buffs and keep both; if you are below 30% HP when bargaining, the demon takes pity and the cost is halved.
  - Cursed Windfall    | Reactive | Triggered when you would die: automatically bargain with a demon of last resort — survive with 1 HP and gain a powerful random buff for 10 seconds, but gain a random debuff for 30 seconds afterward; 90-second cooldown.
  - Demon's Margin     | Passive/Heal  | 20% of all HP you spend on bargains is secretly stored by a cheating demon; after 5 bargains, that demon returns the stored HP as a sudden heal.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Grand Wager        | Active   | Wager your entire HP bar on a coin-flip with a demon: on success, double your current HP and gain a powerful combat buff for 15 seconds; on failure, lose 40% of current HP and gain nothing; this skill cannot kill you.
  - Void Contract      | Active   | Enter a 10-second pact where all your damage is doubled but all healing you receive is reduced to 0; at the end, if you survived, gain a flat 25% max HP heal.
  - Infernal Lottery   | Active   | Spend 15% max HP to roll 3 random skills from any class in the game and use them freely for 12 seconds; skills are returned when the pact expires.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Soul Mortgage      | Active   | Offer your soul as temporary collateral — for 20 seconds gain godlike power (all stats +100%), but you are immediately reduced to 1 HP and cannot heal during the duration; surviving returns your soul plus a bonus permanent stat increase.
  - Crooked Ledger     | Passive/Utility  | You have been cheating demons so long that all bargain HP costs are secretly reduced by 30%; additionally, there is a 15% chance any bargain roll triggers the best possible outcome automatically.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Omega Clause       | Active   | Sign the ultimate infernal contract: for 30 seconds, you become unkillable (damage reduces you to 1 HP but no further) and all your bargain effects are permanently active simultaneously regardless of cost; at the end of 30 seconds the debt comes due — take damage equal to 80% of your max HP and all active buffs are immediately stripped; if you survive the debt payment, permanently retain one random bargain buff as a passive.

>> Your notes on Bargainer:
>>
>>

################################################################################
CLASS 33: Celestial (Angel/Divine Light)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A being of pure divine radiance who has ascended beyond mortal limitations, channeling
the light of heaven itself to soar above battlefields, smite the wicked with blinding holy fire,
and stand as the final shield between the innocent and annihilation.

ARCHETYPE A: Seraphim (Wings, Flight, Aerial Combat)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A mobile aerial duelist who leverages supernatural flight to attack from impossible
angles, control vertical space, and punish grounded enemies with diving strikes and wind shears.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Wing Slash         | Attack   | Beat your divine wings in a powerful arc, slashing all enemies in a 4m semicircle in front of you and pushing them back 2m.
  - Ascendant Step     | Movement | Propel yourself upward or in any direction with a burst of wing power, ignoring terrain; can be used mid-combat to reposition instantly.
  - Feather Tempest    | Passive  | While airborne, all your attacks gain +15% damage and release a small shockwave that pushes nearby enemies back 1m.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Dive Strike        | Attack   | Plunge from height toward a target, dealing damage proportional to the altitude you dropped (up to 300% weapon damage at max height); creates a shockwave on impact.
  - Gale Pinion        | Active   | Beat your wings furiously to generate a sustained gale in a 6m cone for 3 seconds, pushing enemies back, interrupting projectiles, and grounding flying enemies.
  - Celestial Hover    | Passive/Defense  | You can hover indefinitely; while hovering above 3m, you are immune to ground-based AoE effects and gain a 10% damage reduction from all projectiles.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Heaven's Talon     | Attack   | Descend in a corkscrew spin, hitting every enemy in a 3m radius around your landing point for heavy physical and radiant damage; each enemy hit extends your next flight burst by 1 second.
  - Radiant Draft      | Buff/Movement     | Channel divine wind to lift up to 3 allies, granting them temporary limited flight for 8 seconds — they gain Ascendant Step while the buff lasts.
  - Serene Ascent      | Passive  | Ascending above 10m cleanses one debuff per 2 seconds spent at altitude; your first attack after descending from high altitude always crits.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Seraphic Storm     | Channel  | Channel for 1 second then enter a sustained aerial spin for 5 seconds — you fly in an expanding spiral over the battlefield, dealing continuous radiant damage to all enemies below you and creating updrafts that destabilize enemy ranged attacks.
  - Six-Winged Form    | Transform| Unfurl a second pair of celestial wings for 15 seconds: movement speed triples, attack speed doubles, all flight abilities reset their cooldowns, and your wing attacks gain a piercing holy aura that strips enemy buffs on hit.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Empyrean Descent   | Active   | Ascend to divine altitude beyond the battlefield ceiling (briefly leaving combat), then descend as a blazing comet of holy light — dealing catastrophic radiant damage in a 15m blast zone, permanently creating a sacred updraft zone that grants all allies within it limited flight and +25% damage for the remainder of combat.

>> Your notes on Seraphim:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Divine Wrath (Smite, Holy Burst, Purge)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A righteous destroyer who calls down searing celestial judgment on the wicked, with
escalating holy power that obliterates evil and purges corrupted effects from the world.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Smite              | Attack   | Call down a pillar of holy light on one target, dealing radiant damage; deals 50% bonus damage to undead, demonic, or cursed targets.
  - Censure            | Debuff   | Mark a target with divine censure for 8 seconds; they take 20% increased radiant damage from all sources while marked.
  - Holy Fervor        | Passive  | Your radiant damage skills build Holy Fervor charges (max 5); each charge increases your next skill's radiant damage by 10%.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Wrath Cascade      | Attack   | Fire a slow-moving orb of condensed holy light; if it hits a Censured target it explodes in a 5m burst dealing heavy radiant damage to all nearby enemies.
  - Purifying Flame    | Active   | Call down holy fire in a 4m radius at target location, dealing moderate radiant damage and burning away all debuffs from allies caught in the fire; enemies in the fire take amplified damage.
  - Righteous Verdict  | Passive  | When you smite an enemy already below 30% HP, the smite deals double damage and briefly blinds them for 1.5 seconds.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Heaven's Gavel     | Attack   | Spend 3 Holy Fervor charges to call down a massive divine hammer on a target; deals extreme radiant damage, stuns for 2 seconds, and leaves a holy ground zone in a 4m radius that damages enemies standing in it for 5 seconds.
  - Celestial Wrath    | Channel  | Channel for 2 seconds to unleash a continuous beam of divine judgment; deals sustained radiant damage, strips one buff per second from the target, and builds Holy Fervor at 2x the normal rate.
  - Divine Retribution | Reactive | Triggered when an ally falls in combat: immediately cast a free empowered Smite at full Holy Fervor charges on the attacker responsible; 30-second cooldown.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Armageddon Strike  | Active   | Spend all 5 Holy Fervor charges to call down a convergence of seven divine pillars across a 10m area simultaneously; each pillar deals heavy radiant damage and they all detonate simultaneously for an additional massive burst.
  - Judgment Absolute  | Passive  | Once per combat, when you would deal a killing blow with a radiant attack, the target instead explodes in a burst of holy fire dealing 50% of their remaining max HP as radiant damage to all enemies within 6m.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Day of Reckoning   | Active   | Call upon the full wrath of heaven for 10 seconds — radiant pillars strike random enemies every 0.5 seconds, all your cooldowns are reset and halved, Holy Fervor is permanently at max, and all radiant damage you deal pierces 100% of enemy resistances and immunities; at the end, release one final pillar of light dealing 1000% weapon damage as pure radiant energy to the enemy with the most remaining HP.

>> Your notes on Divine Wrath:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE C: Salvation (Resurrection, Protection, Sacred Sanctuary)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A devoted guardian and lifegiver who erects impenetrable divine sanctuaries, recalls
fallen allies from death itself, and sacrifices personal power to ensure no one fights alone.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Lay on Hands       | Heal     | Channel divine light into one ally or yourself, restoring 20% max HP; if the target is below 10% HP, this heals 40% max HP instead.
  - Grace Ward         | Buff/Shield     | Wrap an ally in a protective grace that absorbs the next 200 damage they would take; lasts 10 seconds or until broken.
  - Sacred Ground      | Passive/Heal  | While standing still, you radiate a subtle healing aura that restores 2% max HP per second to yourself and allies within 4m.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Resurrection Pulse | Heal     | Revive one fallen ally with 30% of their max HP at their death location; they return with a 5-second damage immunity grace period.
  - Bastion of Heaven  | Heal   | Create a 6m radius holy sanctuary for 8 seconds; enemies cannot enter the zone (they are pushed back at the boundary), allies inside are healed for 5% max HP per second.
  - Merciful Aegis     | Passive/Shield  | Whenever an ally drops below 25% HP within 8m of you, automatically apply a Grace Ward to them at no cost; 15-second cooldown per ally.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Risen Champion     | Heal     | Revive a fallen ally at full HP with a divine blessing that boosts their damage by 50% for 10 seconds — they return empowered by their brush with death.
  - Heaven's Gate      | Active   | Open a portal to sacred space for 12 seconds; all allies within 10m can step through it to teleport to your position at any time; the gate also cleanses one debuff per ally upon entry.
  - Martyr's Resolve   | Passive/Immunity  | When you take a killing blow, instead of dying, you survive at 1 HP for 5 seconds with complete damage immunity; during this window you may use one skill at no cost; 120-second cooldown.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Mass Salvation     | Heal     | In one radiant pulse, restore 25% max HP to all allies in a 15m radius and simultaneously revive all fallen allies within range with 25% HP; the revival pulse counts as a resurrection for passive trigger purposes.
  - Covenant Shield    | Active/Defense   | Bond yourself to up to 3 allies for 15 seconds; any damage they take above 30% of their max HP is redirected to you at 50% value; if this would kill you, the Martyr's Resolve passive triggers automatically.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Celestial Covenant | Active   | For 20 seconds, become the immortal anchor of your party: all allies are immune to death (reduced to 1 HP minimum) and receive 10% of their max HP per second as healing; you absorb 25% of all damage your allies would take and radiate a blinding divine aura that silences and repels all enemies beyond 5m; when the covenant ends, you collapse briefly into a 3-second vulnerability — if any ally saved by the covenant reaches you in time, they may sacrifice their covenant-healing to stabilize you.

################################################################################
CLASS 34: Spirit Medium (Ghost/Ancestor)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A mortal born with one foot in the land of the dead, the Spirit Medium walks between
worlds — borrowing the unfinished power of legendary dead heroes, binding restless ghosts to
enemy flesh, and weaving the voices of the departed into a haunted chorus of zone control.

ARCHETYPE A: Channeler (Borrow Dead Heroes' Skills, Echo Combat)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A versatile skill mimic who calls on the specific talents of famous dead heroes,
temporarily equipping their signature abilities and playing a different way every fight.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Invoke the Fallen  | Active   | Channel a random fallen hero's minor ability for 8 seconds (pool of 6 abilities: sword ghost's cleave, archer ghost's volley, mage ghost's bolt, healer ghost's mend, scout ghost's dash, berserker ghost's fury strike).
  - Spiritual Resonance| Passive  | Each time you invoke a hero, gain a Resonance stack (max 3); each stack increases the potency of the next invocation by 15%.
  - Dismiss Echo       | Active   | Immediately end an active invocation and gain 50% of its remaining duration as cooldown reduction on all skills.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Named Invocation   | Active   | Call upon a specific remembered hero by name (up to 3 named heroes stored); channel their signature skill for 10 seconds at full potency rather than random selection.
  - Echo Mastery       | Passive/Utility  | While channeling a hero, you learn their combat style; for 30 seconds after an invocation ends, use one of their skills as a free bonus action once.
  - Ancestor's Wisdom  | Buff     | Call upon an elder ancestor spirit for guidance: for 8 seconds reveal all enemy weaknesses (displayed as glowing points), and your attacks target these points for +25% damage.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Dual Invocation    | Active   | Channel two hero spirits simultaneously for 8 seconds; you gain one ability from each hero but both are at 70% potency; Resonance stacks apply to both.
  - Hero's Last Stand  | Reactive | When you drop below 20% HP, automatically invoke the most powerful hero in your roster without consuming a cooldown; this invocation lasts 6 seconds and deals 150% normal potency; 90-second cooldown.
  - Memory Weave       | Active   | Instead of channeling a hero's combat skill, borrow their knowledge — choose a utility or passive trait from a fallen hero (stealth, tracking, trap-craft, diplomacy) and benefit from it for 5 minutes out of combat.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Legendary Vessel   | Transform| Fully merge with your most powerful named hero for 15 seconds: take on their physical form, gain access to their entire skill set, and benefit from their peak-life stat spread; your own HP and current debuffs persist into the form.
  - Harmonic Chorus    | Active   | Simultaneously invoke minor echoes of 5 dead heroes at once; each contributes a different passive benefit for 10 seconds (e.g., damage bonus, speed, armor, crit chance, HP regeneration) rather than active skills.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Hall of Heroes     | Active   | Open a spectral conduit to the entire Hall of Heroes for 20 seconds — every hero you have ever invoked appears as a translucent ghost and fights alongside you simultaneously, each dealing their signature attack every 2 seconds; you gain access to all named invocations at once for the duration, and Resonance stacks are consumed to empower each ghost's output.

>> Your notes on Channeler:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Haunter (Attach Spirits to Enemies, Debilitate, Possess Foes)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A terrifying debuffer who binds hostile ghost spirits to enemies, afflicting them with
spectral torments, draining their will to fight, and ultimately seizing control of their bodies.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Spirit Brand       | Debuff   | Mark one enemy with a clinging ghost that deals periodic spirit damage every 2 seconds for 8 seconds; the ghost hisses distracting whispers, reducing the target's focus (increases skill cooldowns by 10%).
  - Frightful Presence | Passive/Evasion  | Enemies afflicted by your spirits have a 15% chance to miss attacks due to ghostly interference.
  - Banshee Wail       | CC       | Emit a piercing spectral scream in a 5m cone; enemies hearing it are feared for 1.5 seconds and take moderate spirit damage.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Bound Revenant     | Debuff   | Attach a powerful revenant spirit to an enemy for 10 seconds; the revenant saps their strength (-20% damage output), leeches their health (3% max HP per second), and can be detonated early for a burst of spirit damage.
  - Spectral Leash     | CC       | A ghost seizes an enemy and roots them in place for 3 seconds; if the enemy tries to use a movement skill during this time, the ghost drags them back to the root point.
  - Haunt Stack        | Passive  | Each different spirit attached to the same enemy increases the damage of all spirits on that target by 15% (max 60% bonus).

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Echo Chamber       | Debuff   | Attach a mimicry-ghost to a target; for 8 seconds, whenever the enemy uses a skill, the ghost creates a weakened echo of it that strikes them instead, dealing 50% of the skill's damage back at them.
  - Mass Haunting      | Active   | Simultaneously attach a minor spirit to every enemy in a 10m radius; each spirit deals periodic damage and applies a unique minor debuff (randomly: slow, weaken, silence, blind, or bleed) for 5 seconds.
  - Soul Drain         | Channel/Heal  | Channel a sustained drain through attached spirits for 3 seconds: drain 8% max HP per second from all haunted enemies and convert 50% of drained HP into healing for yourself.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Usurp              | CC       | Force a powerful dominating spirit into an enemy's body, seizing control for 4 seconds; control the enemy directly as a puppet — all their attacks deal 125% of their normal damage and target their former allies; after the spirit is expelled, the enemy is stunned for 2 seconds.
  - Spectral Epidemic  | Passive  | Spirits can now jump: when a haunted enemy dies, their spirit leaps to the nearest un-haunted enemy within 6m with full duration refreshed; spirits that jump deal 25% bonus damage.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Army of the Restless | Active | Release a torrent of all spirits in your collection simultaneously, haunting every enemy on the battlefield at once; each enemy receives a full stack of a unique personalized ghost tailored to their most-used skill type (warriors get rage-ghosts that make them erratic, healers get silence-ghosts, casters get chaos-ghosts that misfire spells); the haunting lasts 12 seconds and you passively leech 2% max HP per haunted enemy per second.

>> Your notes on Haunter:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE C: Seance Circle (Spirit Zone Control, Ritual Area, Communion)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A territorial ritualist who consecrates ground as a spirit nexus, controlling the
battlefield through expanding seance circles that empower allies and decay enemies from within.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Consecrate Ground  | Active   | Draw a 5m spirit circle at your feet that lasts 10 seconds; allies inside gain 10% damage reduction, enemies inside take periodic minor spirit damage.
  - Spirit Beacon      | Active   | Plant a glowing beacon that anchors spirits in a 6m radius; spirits in this zone have their duration extended by 50% and deal 20% more damage.
  - Attunement         | Passive/Heal  | While standing within any spirit zone you have created, regenerate 1% max HP and 1 skill resource per second.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Expansion Rite     | Active   | Perform a 1-second ritual to expand the nearest spirit circle's radius by 3m and refresh its duration by 8 seconds.
  - Warding Circle     | Active   | Create a spirit circle that functions as a barrier: enemies attempting to cross the circle's boundary take heavy spirit damage and are briefly slowed 50%; does not prevent crossing, but punishes it.
  - Layline Tap        | Passive/Utility  | Each time an enemy dies within your spirit circle, the circle's power increases: +5% damage dealt, +5% healing for allies (max 5 stacks per circle, stacks reset when circle expires).

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Seance Network     | Active   | Connect two spirit circles you have placed; spirits and effects flow between connected circles instantly, effectively doubling the active area; allies teleport between connected circles freely.
  - Veil Between Worlds| Active   | For 8 seconds, your spirit circle becomes partially phased with the spirit realm: allies inside gain 20% evasion (attacks partially pass through their semi-spectral forms), enemies inside have their armor reduced 30% as material substance thins.
  - Ancestral Pillar   | Summon   | Erect a spectral pillar at the center of a spirit circle that auto-attacks enemies within the zone every 2 seconds with spirit bolts and shouts disorienting war cries that silence for 0.5 seconds on hit.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Grand Seance       | Channel  | Channel for 3 seconds to call forth a massive 12m permanent spirit nexus; the nexus persists for 20 seconds, dealing continuous spirit damage to all enemies, healing all allies for 4% HP per second, and drawing in lost ghost energies that empower any spirits you deploy within for +75% damage.
  - Spirit Maze        | Active   | Reshape your active spirit circles into a labyrinthine network of invisible spirit walls for 10 seconds; only you and your allies can navigate the correct path freely — enemies who walk into spirit walls are disoriented (random movement direction for 2 seconds) and take moderate damage per wall contact.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Convergence of Worlds | Active| Merge the spirit realm with the physical realm for 15 seconds in a 20m radius: the dead literally rise from the ground as spectral soldiers fighting for you (one ghost soldier per enemy kill in this combat, max 10), all spirit zone effects triple in potency, and enemies in the convergence zone take constant spirit damage as their life force bleeds into the spirit world; when the convergence ends, all spectral soldiers simultaneously implode in massive explosions.

################################################################################
CLASS 35: Chemist (Potion/Bomb Alchemist)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A roving laboratory in human form, the Chemist clangs with vials, burners, and fuses —
turning volatile reagents into custom cocktails of chaos, hurling explosive creations across
battlefields, and drinking experimental concoctions that warp their own body into a weapon.

ARCHETYPE A: Mixologist (Combine Reagents, Custom Effects, Synthesis)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A flexible crafter who combines two reagents mid-combat to produce targeted effects,
rewarding preparation and adaptability with an ever-changing toolkit.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Basic Tincture     | Heal     | Quickly mix a simple healing draft using base reagents, restoring 15% max HP to self or one ally.
  - Reagent Pouch      | Passive/Utility  | Begin each combat with 6 Reagent Tokens (representing your field kit); many Mixologist skills consume tokens, which regenerate 1 per 10 seconds.
  - Acid Flask         | Attack   | Mix a quick acid vial (1 token) and hurl it at one target; deals moderate corrosive damage and reduces their armor by 15% for 6 seconds.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Compound Formula   | Active   | Spend 2 tokens to synthesize a dual-effect potion; choose two effects from: Fire Damage, Slow, Blind, Heal, Speed Boost, or Silence; apply both simultaneously to target (offense) or ally (support).
  - Catalyst Rush      | Active   | Spend 1 token to instantly apply the next crafted compound at 150% potency and 0 cast time; 15-second cooldown.
  - Efficient Synthesis| Passive/Utility  | Whenever you mix a compound that directly counters an enemy's active skill type (e.g., acid vs. metal armor, freeze vs. fire user), you receive 1 token refund.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Triple Distillate  | Active   | Spend 3 tokens to mix a triple-compound; choose three effects from the full formula list; the compound can be applied to an ally as a multi-buff or thrown at an enemy as a multi-debuff.
  - Master Recipe      | Active   | Spend all remaining tokens at once; the compound synthesized is uniquely powerful — its damage or healing scales directly with the number of tokens consumed (each token = +30% potency).
  - Reactive Mixture   | Passive  | Compounds you apply to enemies interact: if two different debuff compounds are active on the same target simultaneously, they react for a spontaneous 4m burst of combined elemental damage.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Philosopher's Draft| Active   | Spend 4 tokens to create a legendary compound with one of three extreme random effects: (1) Grant one ally invulnerability for 5 seconds, (2) Reduce all enemies in 8m to 1 HP instantly (does not kill), or (3) Fully restore your entire team's HP; effect is unknown until consumed.
  - Perfect Equilibrium| Passive  | Your Reagent Token cap increases to 10; whenever your tokens are at max capacity, all your compounds are automatically at 150% potency at no extra cost.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Grand Elixir       | Active   | Spend 8 tokens to distill the ultimate alchemical creation — a single dose of Grand Elixir; choose at cast time whether to use it offensively (apply to a 10m radius, triggering every possible elemental damage type simultaneously for massive AoE devastation) or supportively (apply to all allies, granting every possible buff simultaneously for 15 seconds); the formula is perfect and cannot fail.

>> Your notes on Mixologist:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Bombardier (Thrown Explosive AoE, Fuse Timing, Cluster Bombs)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A ranged demolitions expert who lobs fused explosives with precision — juggling timer
mechanics, shaped charges, and chain detonations to devastate grouped enemies.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Fuse Grenade       | Attack   | Throw a standard grenade with a 1.5-second fuse; explodes in a 3m radius dealing moderate fire damage.
  - Short Fuse         | Passive/Utility  | Grenades thrown within 5m of yourself detonate instantly; reduces the risk of hold-and-wait but also eliminates premature-throw safety.
  - Smoke Screen       | Active   | Throw a smoke canister that creates a 5m blind zone for 6 seconds; enemies inside are blinded, allies inside gain 20% evasion from ranged attacks.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Cluster Bomb       | Attack   | Throw a bomb that splits mid-flight into 5 smaller bomblets scattered in a 6m radius; each bomblet deals moderate damage with a 0.5-second stagger.
  - Shaped Charge      | Attack   | A directional explosive that fires all its force in a narrow cone; deals very high damage in a 2m wide, 10m long corridor — excellent against tightly packed or line formations.
  - Timed Array        | Active   | Plant up to 3 timed charges at different locations simultaneously; all three detonate together when you send the trigger signal (or after 20 seconds).

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Incendiary Barrage | Active   | Throw 3 incendiary grenades in rapid succession at separate targets; each creates a burning 4m zone lasting 5 seconds that deals fire damage per second and makes leaving cost extra movement (viscous burning gel).
  - Concussion Charge  | Attack   | A non-lethal but high-impact blast in a 5m radius; deals modest damage but stuns all targets for 2 seconds and interrupts all channeled skills.
  - Daisy Chain        | Passive  | Explosions from your bombs trigger a chain reaction: each detonation has a 40% chance to ignite an additional secondary explosion at a random point within 4m of the original blast.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Bunker Buster      | Active   | A massive delayed charge with a 3-second fuse; upon detonation, deals extreme damage in a 8m radius and leaves a 6-second burning crater zone; penetrates cover and terrain, dealing damage through thin walls.
  - Saturation Bombing | Active   | Enter a 5-second bombing frenzy: throw grenades automatically every 0.75 seconds at the nearest enemy cluster; each grenade is randomly selected from your known bomb types; cannot use other skills during the frenzy.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Big One        | Channel  | Spend 3 seconds arming a catastrophic megabomb; hurl it up to 20m where it detonates in a 15m radius explosion dealing devastating fire and shockwave damage — the primary blast destroys terrain features, knocks down all enemies (prone for 3 seconds), and leaves a raging inferno zone for 10 seconds that deals sustained fire damage; the shockwave alone at the edge of the radius deals 200% weapon damage.

>> Your notes on Bombardier:
>>
