  - Expendable          | Passive/Utility  | When a summon dies, gain a Horde Charge; spend 3 charges to instantly resummon 3 Imps for free

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Summon Batch        | Summon   | Summon 3 Imps simultaneously, instantly filling gaps in the horde
  - Swarm Tactics       | Active   | Command all Imps to simultaneously target a single enemy's limbs, applying a crippling debuff for 5s
  - Horde Resilience    | Passive/Defense  | While you have 5 or more active summons, gain +15% damage reduction as you use them as a physical buffer

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Upgrade Horde       | Summon   | Sacrifice 4 Imps to summon 1 Elite Minion with significantly higher stats; can maintain 2 Elite Minions maximum
  - Mass Assault        | Active   | Command every summon to charge simultaneously, each dealing a modified attack with a 2s rush before returning to normal behavior
  - Swarm Intelligence  | Passive  | Every 2 additional active summons beyond 4 grants all summons +5% damage due to tactical coordination

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Endless Horde       | Summon   | For 15s, whenever a summon dies it is instantly and freely replaced; the horde maintains maximum numbers automatically
  - Champion Summon     | Summon   | Sacrifice all active Imps to summon a Champion creature with stats based on the number of Imps sacrificed; persists for 25s

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Legion              | Summon   | Summon the full Legion — an army of 20 Imps, 4 Elite Minions, and 1 Champion simultaneously; for 20s all summons attack at double speed, cannot be reduced below 1 HP more than once every 3s, and can be commanded in coordinated battalion attacks that hit the entire enemy force; when the Legion duration ends all surviving summons sacrifice themselves in a coordinated explosion dealing massive AoE damage

>> Your notes on Horde Master:
>>
>>

[YOUR OVERALL NOTES ON SUMMONER]
>
>
>


################################################################################
CLASS 73: Dragoon (Aerial/Jump Warrior)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A sky warrior who has mastered the art of aerial combat, launching from the ground in tremendous leaps that give their attacks gravitational momentum, riding wyverns into diving strikes, and channeling the primal power of dragons into their scales, breath, and blood.

ARCHETYPE A: Sky Piercer (Jump, Burst, Aerial)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Specializes in jump attacks that gain damage based on height and distance traveled, maximizing burst damage from the apex of each leap.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Leaping Strike      | Attack   | Jump to a target location and drive a spear downward, dealing moderate damage plus bonus damage based on jump height
  - Sky Step            | Movement | Perform a rapid upward leap to gain height advantage; next attack benefits from aerial positioning bonus
  - Momentum Spear      | Passive  | The higher you are when you begin an attack, the more bonus damage it gains; maximum +40% at 10m height

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Dragon Dive         | Attack   | Leap high and dive at extreme speed, dealing heavy damage on impact and creating a shockwave in a 4m radius
  - Sky Assault         | Attack   | Chain 3 aerial jumps in rapid succession, each landing dealing increasing damage with the momentum of the previous
  - High Altitude       | Passive/Defense  | While airborne, gain +15% damage reduction and +10% damage; landing from height generates a shockwave for free

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Stratospheric       | Active   | Launch to extreme height (15m) in 2s then dive down with a devastating impact dealing maximum jump-bonus damage and leaving a crater that slows enemies for 10s
  - Triple Sky Piercer  | Attack   | Perform the classic three-jump dragoon technique, each jump targeting a different enemy and dealing increasing damage
  - Apex Predator       | Passive  | At the peak of any jump, briefly hover for 0.5s with enhanced targeting, making the subsequent strike a guaranteed critical hit

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Heaven's Fall       | Attack   | Launch yourself to the clouds and fall from truly massive height; the impact deals catastrophic damage in a 6m radius and craters the terrain permanently
  - Jump Mastery        | Passive  | Your jump height and distance are doubled; all jump attacks gain an additional 20% damage bonus and your landing shockwaves now deal significant damage

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Orbital Strike      | Active   | Launch into a high orbit trajectory that takes 4s before returning; while airborne you are untargetable and the descent generates extreme velocity — impact deals massive single-target damage plus catastrophic AoE shockwave in 10m, craters the terrain, and the atmospheric re-entry leaves a burning fire trail hitting all enemies in your descent path for heavy damage

>> Your notes on Sky Piercer:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Wyvern Rider (Mounted, Aerial Combat, Dive)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Bonds with and rides a wyvern mount, fighting as a mounted aerial unit that can strafe, dive-bomb, and launch from the wyvern's back.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Mount Wyvern        | Summon   | Summon and mount your wyvern; while mounted, gain access to aerial movement and mounted attacks
  - Strafe Run          | Attack   | Command the wyvern to strafe a target line, dealing moderate damage to all enemies in a 15m path
  - Wyvern Bond         | Passive  | Your wyvern shares 40% of your stat increases and has its own HP bar equal to 60% of your max HP

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Dive Bomb           | Attack   | Command the wyvern to dive at a target, crashing down for heavy AoE damage in a 5m radius before recovering altitude
  - Aerial Spear        | Attack   | Throw your spear from wyvern-back at extreme velocity, dealing heavy damage at long range with a brief stagger
  - Aerial Superiority  | Passive/Defense  | While airborne on the wyvern, gain +20% damage reduction and all ground-based movement impairment effects are ignored

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Wyvern Frenzy       | Active   | Command the wyvern into combat frenzy for 10s; it attacks independently at +50% speed while you continue your own attacks from its back
  - Death From Above    | Attack   | Achieve altitude and make a precision dive, targeting a single enemy with a full-speed spear impact from height dealing massive damage
  - Rider's Instinct    | Passive/Defense  | Reduce all damage taken by wyvern by 25%; when the wyvern takes a hit, you immediately counterattack the attacker for free

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Sky Terror          | Active   | Announce yourself from altitude with a wyvern screech that fears all enemies for 3s and marks them all for aerial targeting
  - Wyvern Resurrection | Active   | If the wyvern is killed, revive it after 10s at 50% HP; once per encounter, the revive happens instantly if you were airborne when it died

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Dragon's Wrath      | Active   | Unleash the wyvern's full apex predator fury for 20s; the wyvern grows to twice normal size, gains triple HP, attacks 3 different enemies per round, and its dives now deal catastrophic AoE damage; simultaneously you execute five free aerial spear throws per round from its back — when the frenzy ends the wyvern retreats and you land in the center of the enemy force with a Heaven's Fall impact

>> Your notes on Wyvern Rider:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE C: Dragon Heart (Draconic, Breath, Scales)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Channels the blood of dragons coursing through their veins, growing scales, unleashing breath weapons, and eventually becoming something more dragon than human.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Dragon Scales       | Buff/Defense     | Manifest draconic scales on your body for 20s, gaining +15% physical damage reduction
  - Flame Breath        | Attack   | Exhale a short cone of dragonfire dealing moderate fire damage to all enemies in a 6m cone
  - Draconic Blood      | Passive/Resistance  | Your dragon heritage grants +10% resistance to all elemental damage types

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Scale Armor         | Buff/Defense     | Harden your scales to a full armor rating for 15s, gaining +25% damage reduction and thorns damage to attackers
  - Acid Breath         | Attack   | Exhale an acid cone dealing damage over time to all hit and reducing their armor by 20% for 10s
  - Dragon's Roar       | Active   | Release a terrifying draconic roar in a 12m cone, fearing all enemies for 3s

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Lightning Breath    | Attack   | Channel a lightning breath in a 15m line, dealing heavy lightning damage and chaining to adjacent enemies
  - Dragon's Wrath      | Buff     | Embrace full draconic anger for 12s; all breath attacks are empowered by 50% and your melee strikes deal bonus elemental damage based on your active breath type
  - Partial Transform   | Transform| Partially transform into a draconic form, growing claws and wings for 15s; gain +20% to all stats and the ability to fly

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Full Dragon Form    | Transform| Transform into a towering draconic warrior for 20s; all stats double, all breath attacks upgrade in size, and your melee strikes leave elemental burn effects
  - Ancestral Breath    | Attack   | Channel the most powerful breath of your dragon lineage — a catastrophic inferno/acid/lightning beam that deals massive damage in a 20m line

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Dragon Ascendant    | Transform| Achieve full draconic apotheosis for 25s; you become a true dragon — massive size, flight, maximum elemental resistances, triple all stats, a free breath weapon every 3s, and melee attacks that deal catastrophic damage and apply all three breath-weapon effects simultaneously; when the form expires you revert to your warrior form surrounded by a dragonfire explosion that deals massive AoE damage to all nearby enemies

################################################################################
CLASS 74: Mirror Knight (Reflection/Counter Warrior)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A warrior who has trained not to overpower enemies but to become a perfect mirror of their own force, returning everything sent at them with interest. The Mirror Knight is at their most dangerous when their opponent is at their most powerful.

ARCHETYPE A: Perfect Counter (Timing, Riposte, Windows)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Executes perfectly timed ripostes within narrow reaction windows, converting any missed opportunity into punishment and any successful parry into a devastating counter.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Parry               | Reactive | Enter a 0.5s parry window; successfully timed parries block all damage and open a riposte window
  - Riposte             | Attack   | After a successful parry, immediately counter-strike for 150% of the blocked attack's damage
  - Counter Instinct    | Passive  | Your parry window can be activated 0.2s earlier than normal; successful parries grant a brief +10% attack speed buff

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Extended Window     | Active   | Extend your parry window to 1s for the next 3 attacks; less demanding but riposte damage is reduced to 120%
  - Punishing Riposte   | Passive  | Perfect parries (timed in the last 0.1s of the window) deal 200% riposte damage and apply a 3s stagger to the attacker
  - Counter Flow        | Passive  | Successfully chained parries within 8s each grant a stacking 10% riposte damage bonus, up to 5 stacks

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Multi-Parry         | Reactive | Enter a 2s window that can parry up to 3 sequential attacks; each parry feeds a stacking riposte that releases after the final parry
  - Shield Break Counter| Attack   | After a parry against a shielded enemy, the riposte bypasses their shield entirely and deals bonus damage to the shielded arm
  - Anticipate          | Passive  | Read the enemy's attack telegraph; your parry window triggers 0.5s before the attack lands giving you a clear visual cue for perfect timing

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Perfect Reflection  | Active   | For 8s, every attack against you is automatically perfectly parried regardless of timing; ripostes are all at maximum damage
  - Thousand Counters   | Active   | Enter a concentrated 5s state where you can parry and riposte at machine-gun speed, potentially countering dozens of attacks in the window

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Undefeatable Counter | Active | Transcend ordinary timing and achieve reactive perfection for 15s; every attack of any type aimed at you from any direction is automatically intercepted and returned as a perfect riposte at 250% damage, chained ripostes each deal 10% more than the last, and the accumulated counter-force culminates in a single catastrophic release strike at the end of the duration dealing damage equal to the sum of all damage countered during the 15s

>> Your notes on Perfect Counter:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Mirror Image (Clones, Defense, Confusion)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Creates mirror image copies of themselves that confuse enemies, absorb hits, and create tactical confusion that makes the real Mirror Knight untouchable.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Mirror Image        | Active   | Create 2 illusory copies of yourself; each copy has minimal HP and mimics your movement for 15s
  - Redirect            | Passive/Evasion  | Each mirror image has a 40% chance to intercept attacks aimed at the real you and absorb them
  - Image Strike        | Attack   | Command a mirror image to rush and explode on a target enemy, dealing moderate damage and confusing the target about your location for 3s

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Triple Image        | Active   | Upgrade Mirror Image to create 3 copies simultaneously; each copy now has 15% of your HP
  - Copy Ability        | Active   | Command a mirror image to use one of your active abilities at 70% potency as a diversion
  - Confusion Array     | Active   | All active mirror images perform the same action simultaneously; the real you performs the true version, images perform weaker copies

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Living Mirror       | Active   | Animate one mirror image with 30% of your stats for 15s; it fights independently as a genuine threat rather than a distraction
  - Infinite Regress    | Active   | When a mirror image is destroyed, it creates 2 new weaker copies; this can chain up to 3 generations before the final images simply vanish
  - Swap               | Active   | Instantly exchange positions with a mirror image, causing any tracking attacks to hit the image instead of you

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Mirror Army         | Active   | Create 5 mirror images simultaneously, each with 20% of your stats, for 20s; enemy AI is significantly disrupted trying to find the real you
  - Perfect Copy        | Active   | Create one perfect copy with 80% of your stats for 12s; it uses all your abilities and is nearly indistinguishable from you

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Hall of Mirrors     | Active   | Fill the encounter zone with 8 mirror images for 20s; each has 25% of your stats, fights independently, and uses your abilities freely; the enemy has no reliable way to distinguish you from your images; when images are destroyed they explode for moderate AoE damage, and if more than 5 are destroyed within 5s the hall collapses in a cascade of reflected energy dealing massive AoE damage to all enemies

>>

ARCHETYPE C: Reflector (Damage Reflection, Spell Bounce, Return)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Builds physical and magical reflective surfaces that return incoming damage to its source, turning enemy power into self-inflicted wounds.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Mirror Shield       | Buff/Defense     | Raise your reflective shield for 10s; 20% of all physical damage received is reflected to the attacker
  - Spell Bounce        | Reactive | Reflect the next single-target spell aimed at you back to its caster for 50% potency
  - Reflective Surface  | Passive/Defense  | Your armor passively reflects 5% of all incoming damage at all times

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Polished Defense    | Buff/Defense     | Polish your reflective armor to maximum for 12s; physical reflection increases to 35%
  - Cascade Bounce      | Passive  | Reflected spells can bounce once more from the caster to the nearest additional enemy for 30% of reflected value
  - Mirror Coat         | Buff/Defense     | Apply a reflective coating to an ally; they reflect 25% of all damage received for 15s

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Full Reflection     | Buff/Defense     | Achieve complete reflective state for 8s; 50% of all incoming damage from all sources is reflected to its origin
  - Shatter Reflect     | Active   | Concentrate all reflected damage stored in the last 5s and release it at once as a single concentrated beam at target
  - Broadcast           | Active   | For 5s, split all reflected damage among all enemies on the field rather than directing it only at the attacker

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Mirror Fortress     | Active   | Surround the entire party in reflective barriers for 10s; 40% of all damage against any party member is reflected to its source
  - Amplified Return    | Passive/Defense  | Reflected damage now deals 120% of the received value, returning more damage than was sent; reflection is now always advantageous

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Perfect Mirror  | Active   | Achieve absolute reflective transcendence for 12s; 100% of all damage from all sources aimed at you is reflected at 120% potency back to its source, magical effects reflect back as exact copies at full power, and enemies deal more damage to themselves than to you by attacking; at the end of the duration all reflected damage dealt during the window is totaled and released as a single final beam dealing that sum as direct damage to the most dangerous enemy on the field

################################################################################
CLASS 75: Symbiote Host (Alien Parasite Sci-fi)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A reluctant or willing host to an alien symbiotic organism that has rewritten their biology into something far more than human, extending their body in impossible ways, adapting in real time to whatever kills other organisms, and consuming everything they defeat to grow stronger.

ARCHETYPE A: Tendril (Extension, Reach, Grapple)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Extends symbiotic tendrils from their body as weapons and tools, attacking at range, grappling multiple enemies, and traversing terrain in ways no unaugmented body could.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Tendril Lash        | Attack   | Extend a tendril 8m to whip at an enemy, dealing moderate damage and pulling them 3m toward you
  - Tendril Grasp       | CC       | Extend a tendril to grab an enemy's weapon arm, preventing them from attacking for 2s
  - Reach               | Passive  | Your melee attack range is extended by 3m from tendril augmentation; all melee strikes now have reach capability

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Multi-Tendril       | Attack   | Extend 3 tendrils simultaneously to strike 3 different enemies in one action
  - Tendril Anchor      | Movement | Fire a tendril to a fixed point and reel yourself there instantly, covering up to 15m
  - Stranglehold        | CC       | Wrap a tendril around an enemy's neck; they are held for 4s and take choking damage each second

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Tendril Web         | Active   | Deploy a web of tendrils across a 10m area that snares the feet of any enemy passing through for 3s
  - Tendril Flurry      | Attack   | Extend 6 tendrils in rapid sequence at a single target, each dealing moderate damage for a total of 6 hits in 3s
  - Living Weapon       | Passive  | Your tendrils now carry a symbiotic toxin; each tendril hit applies a stacking debuff reducing the target's armor by 8%

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Tendril Fortress    | Active   | Deploy tendrils in all directions, lashing any enemy who approaches within 5m for free damage and pulling them off course for 12s
  - Massive Extension   | Attack   | Extend a single enormous tendril 20m to grab a target and slam them repeatedly into the ground for 3 hits of heavy damage

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Symbiote Bloom      | Active   | Allow the symbiote to fully bloom for 15s, extending dozens of tendrils in all directions simultaneously; tendrils auto-attack all enemies in a 12m radius every second, grab and slam any enemy who attempts to close to melee range, reel in ranged enemies who try to maintain distance, and deal bonus damage that scales with the total number of tendril hits landed in the encounter so far

>> Your notes on Tendril:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Adaptive Shell (Morph, Resistance, Countermeasure)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Rapidly adapts the symbiote's outer shell to resist or counter whatever damage types are being faced, becoming exponentially harder to damage the longer combat continues.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Analyze Threat      | Active   | Scan the current damage types being used against you; gain 5% resistance to each identified type for 20s
  - Reactive Shell      | Reactive/Defense | When hit by a new damage type, automatically adapt 10% resistance to that type for the encounter
  - Baseline Adaptation | Passive/Resistance  | Begin each encounter with 5% resistance to physical damage from the symbiote's baseline hardening

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Rapid Adaptation    | Passive/Resistance  | Each time you are hit, resistance to that damage type increases by 3% for the encounter, stacking indefinitely
  - Countermeasure      | Active   | Actively deploy a targeted countermeasure to the most recent damage type, gaining 25% resistance instantly
  - Shell Harden        | Buff/Resistance     | Deliberately harden the symbiote shell for 10s, doubling all current resistance values for the duration

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Full Spectrum       | Active   | Spend 3s letting the symbiote analyze all threats; gain 15% resistance to every damage type for 30s
  - Immunity Protocol   | Active   | Identify the most frequent damage source in the encounter and become temporarily immune to it for 8s
  - Absorb and Counter  | Reactive/Defense | Once every 20s, when taking significant damage, absorb 30% of it and release it as a counterattack of the same damage type

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Mirror Adaptation   | Passive  | When resistance to a type exceeds 50%, your attacks gain a bonus of that same type equal to the excess resistance
  - Total Adaptation    | Active/Defense   | For 15s, resistance to all damage types is raised to 60%; adaptations gained during this window persist after it ends

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Perfect Organism    | Active/Defense   | Trigger full symbiote adaptation for 20s; all current resistances are raised to their maximum values, all incoming damage is reduced by a base 40% before resistances, the symbiote learns and counters every new ability used against you for the rest of the encounter, and all excess resistance above 50% is continuously converted to matching damage bonus, making you deadlier in exactly the way enemies try to kill you

ARCHETYPE C: Hunger (Consume, Grow, Escalate)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Feeds the symbiote by consuming defeated enemies and absorbing their biological essence, growing stronger and gaining new properties with each feeding.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Consume             | Active   | Consume a defeated enemy's remains; gain a stack of Biomass that increases max HP by 2% per stack
  - Bite               | Attack   | Deliver a savage biting attack dealing moderate damage and stealing a small amount of the target's regeneration for 10s
  - Hunger Sense        | Passive  | Sense the biological weakness of any enemy below 25% HP; attacks against them deal +20% damage

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Absorption          | Active   | Absorb a defeated enemy during combat to instantly consume them and gain 3 Biomass stacks
  - Devour              | Attack   | Against enemies below 20% HP, attempt to devour them outright; if it kills them, gain double Biomass
  - Fed State           | Passive/Resistance  | At 5 or more Biomass stacks, enter a Fed State granting +10% to all damage and +10% resistance

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Trait Extraction    | Active   | Consume a defeated enemy to extract one of their passive traits, gaining a version of it for the encounter
  - Ravenous            | Buff/Heal     | Enter a 10s Ravenous state where consuming any entity restores 15% of your max HP and grants 5 Biomass instantly
  - Overfeed            | Active   | Consume 10 Biomass stacks at once to trigger a rapid growth burst, gaining +20% to all stats for 20s

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Mass Consumption    | Active   | Rapidly consume all available biomass in a 5m radius; defeated enemy remains, environmental organic matter, all converted to Biomass stacks
  - Apex Hunger         | Passive/Defense  | Biomass stacks no longer have a cap; each stack above 20 now also grants +1% damage reduction in addition to the HP bonus

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Great Feast     | Active   | Unleash the symbiote's ultimate hunger for 20s; your bite range extends to 10m, consuming any killed enemy is instant and automatic, Biomass stack benefits are tripled, you gain Trait Extraction from every consumed enemy simultaneously, and the symbiote's hunger generates a passive consumption aura in 5m that slowly damages and partially absorbs biological enemies — culminating in a final Overfeed that releases all accumulated Biomass as a burst of biological energy dealing damage to all enemies proportional to your current Biomass count

################################################################################
CLASS 76: Glitch (Digital/Matrix/Data)
################################################################################
Fantasy: An anomaly in the simulation, a walking error code who breaks the rules of reality not through magic or science but through raw computational exploitation — freezing enemies in desync, defying death through save states, and overflowing the world's own buffers to shatter its limitations.

ARCHETYPE A: Buffer Overflow (Break Limits, Exceed, Burst)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Pushes their own stat caps beyond normal limits through deliberate buffer overflow exploits, achieving impossible damage numbers at the cost of mounting instability.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Stack Overflow      | Active   | Deliberately overflow one stat (Attack, Speed, or Defense) by 20% beyond normal cap for 8s; gain 1 Instability stack
  - Exploit             | Attack   | Use a known system exploit to deal an attack that ignores 20% of enemy defenses; costs 1 Instability
  - Instability Monitor | Passive  | Track your Instability stacks; below 3 = stable, 4-6 = unstable (minor stat penalties), 7+ = critical (major penalties but major bonuses)

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Double Stack        | Active   | Overflow two stats simultaneously for 10s; gain 3 Instability stacks; stat bonuses are 25% each
  - Crash Immunity      | Passive/Immunity  | The first time you would hit 10 Instability (crash/death), instead drop to 5 Instability and survive with 30% HP
  - Exploit Chain       | Attack   | Chain 3 exploit-based attacks in rapid sequence; each applies 1 Instability but deals escalating damage

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - God Mode Overflow   | Active   | Overflow all stats simultaneously by 30% for 6s; gain 6 Instability stacks; risk high, reward catastrophic
  - Defrag              | Active   | Spend 6s defragmenting; reduce all Instability stacks by 4 and stabilize for the next 15s
  - Overflow Mastery    | Passive  | Each Instability stack now adds +3% to all damage rather than being purely negative; high instability becomes high power

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Critical Overflow   | Active   | Intentionally push to 9 Instability to trigger a near-crash state; all damage is multiplied by 3x for 5s before the system forces a reboot
  - Optimized Exploit   | Passive  | All exploit-based attacks gain an additional 20% penetration; Instability stacks above 5 no longer cause stat penalties

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Total System Exploit | Active  | Push to absolute maximum overflow for 10s; all stats exceed cap by 50%, all attacks bypass all defenses, all damage is automatically critical, all resource costs are zero — but upon the 10s expiration the system crashes, reducing you to 1 HP and 10 Instability; if you kill the primary target during the exploit window the crash does not occur and you instead reboot to 50% HP cleanly

>> Your notes on Buffer Overflow:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Lag (Desync, Time, Timeline)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Desynchronizes enemies from the normal timeline, making them operate on a delay that creates exploitable gaps and a deeply unsettling disconnect from real time.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Input Lag           | Debuff   | Apply 0.5s input lag to an enemy; their attacks visually telegraph 0.5s before execution, making them trivially dodgeable for 10s
  - Frame Drop          | Debuff   | Cause an enemy to drop frames; they stutter and attack with inconsistent timing for 12s, reducing their DPS by 15%
  - Ping Spike          | Active   | Send a spike of simulated latency to an enemy, briefly freezing their position for 1.5s

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Rubberbanding       | CC       | Force an enemy to experience rubberbanding — they teleport back to their position from 3s ago every 5s for 15s, interrupting any action they were taking
  - High Latency Curse  | Debuff   | Apply a persistent high-latency debuff to a target; all their abilities have 1s added to their activation time for 15s
  - Desync Field        | Active   | Create an 8m zone of desynchronization for 12s; all enemies within experience reduced coordination, reducing their accuracy by 25%

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Time Freeze Frame   | CC       | Lock an enemy in a frozen frame for 3s; they are completely immobile while appearing to try to move
  - Lag Cascade         | Active   | Spread the Input Lag debuff from a single target to all enemies within 8m of them
  - Ghost Mode          | Active   | Become desynced from the enemy simulation for 5s; you can still attack them but they cannot accurately target you (80% miss chance against you)

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Mass Desync         | Active   | Apply severe desynchronization to all enemies simultaneously for 10s; all movement is delayed, all attacks are telegraphed, and all abilities have extended cast times
  - Timeline Fork       | Active   | Fork the timeline briefly; you take two actions simultaneously while enemies see only one, dealing double the normal damage output for 4s

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Server Crash        | Active   | Force a localized server crash in the simulation affecting all enemies for 15s; movement speed drops to 10% as physics calculations fail, all abilities trigger on a 2s delay after activation, enemies periodically rubber-band to random positions, and twice during the duration enemies are completely frozen for 2s each in a complete system freeze — when the simulation recovers, all enemies have their positions and states reset to where they were when the crash started

>> Your notes on Lag:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE C: Respawn (Save State, Death Defy, Recovery)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Exploits the simulation's checkpoint system to maintain save states that allow them to survive death, reverse damage, and ultimately achieve effective immortality through careful state management.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Quick Save          | Active   | Create a save state at your current HP and position; 30s cooldown between saves
  - Quick Load          | Active   | Load the most recent save state, restoring HP and position to the saved values; save is consumed on use
  - Autosave            | Passive  | Automatically create a save state every 45s in combat; only one autosave exists at a time

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Save Slot Upgrade   | Passive  | Maintain up to 3 simultaneous save states; manually choose which to load
  - Emergency Load      | Reactive | When reduced to 0 HP, automatically load the most recent save state before dying; 120s cooldown
  - State Transfer      | Heal   | Apply your most recent save state's HP value to an ally, effectively healing them to that HP total

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Perfect Save        | Active   | Create a full state save including HP, position, active buffs, and cooldown timers; loading this save restores all four completely
  - Rewind              | Active   | Roll back your personal state by 5s; undo all damage taken and all actions made in the last 5s at the cost of removing all buffs gained in that window too
  - State Fortress      | Passive/Immunity  | Save states are now immune to deletion by enemy abilities; some enemies could previously destroy your saves

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Checkpoint          | Heal   | Place a permanent encounter-wide checkpoint; anyone killed on your side can be respawned at this checkpoint with 40% HP once; 120s cooldown
  - Infinite Lives      | Active   | For 20s, each death immediately loads the most recent save state without consuming it; effectively unkillable for the duration

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - God Save            | Active   | Create the ultimate save state that captures every detail of the current encounter — all ally HP, positions, buffs, cooldowns, and the entire battlefield state; this save persists for the entire encounter and can be loaded once to completely reset the entire combat to this precise moment, as if the last several minutes never happened, giving your party a perfect second attempt from a chosen strong position

>> Your notes on Respawn:
>>
>>

################################################################################
CLASS 77: Arcanist (Pure Raw Magic)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A scholar-wizard who has moved beyond the training wheels of structured spellbooks and reached directly into the raw substance of magical energy, shaping it by will alone, overloading themselves dangerously for catastrophic output, or endlessly combining fundamental magical components into novel spells never seen before.

ARCHETYPE A: Mana Sculptor (Shape, Sculpt, Custom)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Shapes raw mana into custom geometric constructs and effects with properties determined by the shape and density of the mana used.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Mana Bolt           | Attack   | Shape raw mana into a simple bolt, dealing moderate damage; the most basic expression of sculpted power
  - Mana Shield         | Buff/Shield     | Shape mana into a flat barrier, absorbing moderate damage before dissipating
  - Sculptor's Intuition| Passive  | Your mana shapes 10% faster and the effects of all sculpted spells are 10% more potent

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Mana Blade          | Active   | Sculpt mana into a blade that extends from your hand; makes all attacks melee magical strikes with high cutting damage for 15s
  - Mana Cage           | CC       | Sculpt a mana lattice around an enemy, trapping them for 5s in a containment structure
  - Geometric Precision | Passive  | Spells you sculpt into specific shapes (sphere, cone, line) gain a 20% damage bonus for matching the optimal shape for each target scenario

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Mana Golem          | Summon   | Sculpt a large mana construct to fight on your behalf with good stats for 20s; its damage type is pure arcane
  - Rapid Sculpt        | Passive  | Reduce all sculpting cast times by 40%; very complex sculpts that normally take 2s now take 1.2s
  - Dense Core          | Active   | Create a hyper-compressed mana sphere and detonate it for massive single-target damage

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Living Sculpture    | Active   | Sculpt a semi-intelligent mana construct that autonomously adapts its shape to counter the nearest threat for 15s
  - Grand Sculpt        | Channel  | Channel for 5s to create an enormous complex mana sculpture that releases as a 20m AoE with multiple simultaneous effects

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Masterwork          | Channel  | Spend 6s sculpting the most complex magical construct possible; the Masterwork functions as a persistent autonomous magical entity for 30s that simultaneously shields allies, attacks enemies, debuffs targets, and can be instantly reshaped once during its duration to respond to a crisis — when its duration ends it detonates in a final massive arcane explosion

>> Your notes on Mana Sculptor:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Overchanneler (Dangerous, Overcasting, Explosion)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Channels more magical energy than their body can safely contain, achieving staggering damage output at the escalating cost of self-damage and biological strain.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Minor Overload      | Active   | Push 10% extra mana through your next spell; deal 20% bonus damage but take 5% max HP self-damage
  - Pain Tolerance      | Passive/Defense  | Reduce all self-damage from overcasting by 15%; the body adapts to the strain
  - Burn Through        | Attack   | Force-channel a spell at double mana cost for double damage; self-damage equals 10% of bonus damage dealt

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Moderate Overload   | Active   | Push 25% extra mana through your next spell; deal 40% bonus damage but take 12% max HP self-damage
  - Adrenaline Response | Passive  | When below 50% HP from overcasting, gain +10% spell damage as your body enters crisis output mode
  - Controlled Burn     | Passive  | Each point of self-damage from overcasting adds a 1% damage bonus for 20s, stacking up to 30%

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Major Overload      | Active   | Push 50% extra mana through your next spell; deal 75% bonus damage but take 20% max HP self-damage
  - Overcaster's Will   | Passive/Immunity  | You cannot be reduced below 1 HP by your own overcasting effects; they merely bring you to the brink
  - Channeled Suffering | Active   | Deliberately take 15% max HP self-damage to reset the cooldown of any overload ability instantly

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Critical Mass       | Active   | Overload to the absolute limit; deal 200% bonus damage on next spell but take 35% max HP damage and enter a 5s recovery state
  - Overload Mastery    | Passive  | All overload self-damage is reduced by 25%; all overload bonuses are increased by 25%; the tradeoff becomes markedly more favorable

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Grand Overload      | Active   | Commit to total magical overload for 8s; all spells are auto-overloaded at maximum level, dealing triple normal damage, but you lose 5% HP per second and cannot heal during the window; if you survive the 8s the magical surge reaches criticality and releases as a catastrophic chain-lightning nova dealing damage equal to 100% of all self-damage taken during the window to all enemies simultaneously

>> Your notes on Overchanneler:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE C: Spell Crafter (Components, Combine, Custom Spells)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Combines fundamental magical components (Fire, Force, Time, Mind, Space, Life) to craft novel spells on the fly, with the combined effect determined by the components used.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Load Component: Fire| Active   | Load the Fire component into your casting matrix; modifies the next spell to include fire damage and burn
  - Load Component: Force| Active  | Load the Force component; modifies the next spell to add knockback and physical impact
  - Two-Component Cast  | Passive  | Combine up to 2 components into a single spell; the effects of both components apply simultaneously

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Load Component: Mind| Active   | Load the Mind component; modifies the next spell to include confusion, fear, or mental control elements
  - Load Component: Time| Active   | Load the Time component; modifies the next spell to include slow, haste, or age effects
  - Three-Component Cast| Passive  | Unlock 3-component combinations; 3-component spells gain a Synthesis Bonus of +25% potency on all components

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Load Component: Space| Active  | Load the Space component; modifies the next spell to include teleportation, displacement, or size alteration
  - Load Component: Life | Active  | Load the Life component; modifies the next spell to include healing, growth, or biological effects
  - Signature Spell     | Active   | Save your current component combination as a Signature Spell for instant recall; store up to 3 signatures

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Four-Component Cast | Passive  | Unlock 4-component combinations; 4-component spells are powerful enough to rewrite local physics for 5s in addition to normal effects
  - Perfect Synthesis   | Passive  | When you use 4 or more components, all component effects are amplified by 40% from perfect magical resonance

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Hexad Cast          | Active   | Load all 6 components simultaneously and release them in a single unified spell; the Hexad spell is a unique, context-sensitive magical event that combines all six fundamental forces — it simultaneously damages with fire, disrupts with force, terrifies and controls with mind, ages and slows with time, displaces with space, and drains life from all enemies — dealing moderate damage of each type to all enemies in a 20m radius and applying all corresponding status effects at full potency

################################################################################
CLASS 78: Shaman (Spirit/Totem)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A bridge between the living world and the world of spirits, the Shaman deploys sacred totems that channel elemental and ancestral powers, calls upon the warrior dead to fight once more, and slips into the spirit world to walk between realms and perceive what the living cannot.

ARCHETYPE A: Totem Planter (Deploy, Empower, Zone)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Places and manages a network of totems that each provide different persistent zone-based effects, empowering allies and disrupting enemies.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Plant Healing Totem | Summon   | Place a totem that pulses healing energy to all allies within 8m every 3s for 30s
  - Plant Storm Totem   | Summon   | Place a totem that fires lightning bolts at the nearest enemy every 4s for 30s
  - Totem Mastery       | Passive  | All totems have 50% more HP and last 10s longer; you may have up to 3 totems active simultaneously

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Plant Earthen Totem | Summon   | Place a totem that grants all allies within 8m +15% physical damage reduction for its duration
  - Plant Flame Totem   | Summon   | Place a totem that emits a 6m fire aura dealing fire damage per second to all enemies within
  - Empowered Network   | Passive  | Each additional active totem empowers all other totems by 10%; a full network of 3 totems each operate at 130% effectiveness

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Plant Wind Totem    | Summon   | Place a totem that grants all nearby allies +20% movement and attack speed from wind blessing for its duration
  - Totem Overcharge    | Active   | Sacrifice one totem to instantly empower all remaining totems by 50% for 20s
  - Totem Fortress      | Active   | Deploy 3 specific totems in a defensive triangle formation; the formation creates a protected zone giving allies +25% all resistances inside

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Grand Totem         | Summon   | Place a massive Grand Totem that combines the effects of all your basic totem types simultaneously; persists for 25s
  - Spirit Link         | Active   | Link all active totems together; healing totems contribute to damage totems and vice versa, creating a self-reinforcing network for 20s

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Sacred Circle       | Active   | Spend 3s placing 6 totems in a sacred geometric pattern; the complete Sacred Circle generates a 20m zone where all totem effects are doubled, all allies gain comprehensive elemental resistances, the zone actively repels enemies with force pulses every 5s, and spirit energy continuously builds up that releases as a massive spiritual explosion at the end of the 45s duration

ARCHETYPE B: Ancestor (Spirits, Channel, Warrior Dead)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Calls upon the spirits of ancestral warriors to fight alongside the living, channeling their essence to speak their techniques, borrow their power, or summon them bodily.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Ancestral Call      | Active   | Call upon an ancestor spirit for wisdom; reveal all enemy weak points and gain +10% damage against them for 15s
  - Spirit Weapon       | Buff     | Channel an ancestor's fighting style into your weapon; it becomes spectral and deals both physical and spirit damage for 20s
  - Ancestral Vigil     | Passive/Defense  | Ancestor spirits watch over you; gain +10% damage reduction and a warning when you are about to be hit from behind

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Summon Ancestor     | Summon   | Fully summon an ancestral warrior spirit to fight beside you with moderate stats for 20s
  - Battle Chant        | Buff/Resistance     | Channel an ancestor's war chant; all allies within 10m gain +15% damage and +10% resistance to all damage types for 15s
  - Ancestor's Fury     | Active   | Channel an enraged ancestor's berserker rage; for 8s all your attacks deal bonus spirit damage equal to 20% of physical damage

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Ancestral Council   | Summon   | Summon 3 ancestor spirits simultaneously, each with different tactical specializations (warrior, healer, mage), for 15s
  - Channel Hero        | Active   | Channel the spirit of a legendary ancestral hero for 10s; gain access to their signature ability and double your primary stat
  - Ancestor's Sacrifice| Active   | Ask an ancestor to sacrifice their spiritual essence; dismiss a summoned ancestor to trigger a massive spirit explosion dealing heavy AoE damage

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Ancestral Army      | Summon   | Summon a full unit of 6 ancestral warriors for 20s; they fight as a coordinated squad with tactical intelligence
  - Spirit Communion    | Channel  | Channel a deep communion with all ancestors for 5s; gain perfect knowledge of all enemy abilities and stats and receive a blessing that increases all stats by 30% for 30s

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Great Ancestor  | Summon   | Summon the great progenitor ancestor — the mightiest spirit of the lineage — for 20s; this titan of a spirit has triple the stats of normal ancestors, uses all combat techniques simultaneously, inspires all current ancestral summons to fight at double effectiveness, and when their time runs out willingly detonates in a spiritual holocaust that deals massive AoE spirit damage to all enemies and permanently empowers all remaining ancestral summons

ARCHETYPE C: Spirit Walk (Ethereal, Perception, Between Worlds)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Enters and navigates the spirit world that overlays the physical, gaining unique perception, movement through obstacles, and the ability to attack from the spiritual plane.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Spirit Sight        | Active   | See into the spirit world for 15s; reveal all hidden, invisible, and stealthed enemies and perceive their spiritual weaknesses
  - Partial Walk        | Active   | Enter a half-step into the spirit world for 3s; become semi-transparent, taking 30% reduced damage from physical attacks
  - Spirit Touch        | Attack   | Attack from a half-step in the spirit world; deals spirit damage that bypasses physical armor entirely

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Full Spirit Walk    | Active   | Fully enter the spirit world for 8s; become completely intangible to physical attacks while retaining the ability to attack physically
  - Phase Through       | Movement | While in any spirit walk state, pass through walls, barriers, and terrain features without obstruction
  - Spirit World Sense  | Passive/Utility  | While in the spirit world, gain a 360-degree awareness of all entities in the physical world; cannot be surprised

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Spirit Strike       | Attack   | Attack a physical enemy from full spirit walk; the strike emerges from the spirit plane dealing heavy spirit damage and ignoring all defenses
  - Anchor Pull         | Active   | From the spirit world, grab an enemy's spirit and drag them partially into the spirit plane, making them vulnerable to spirit damage for 10s
  - Extended Walk       | Passive  | Spirit Walk duration is increased by 50% and the cooldown is reduced by 30%; the spirit plane feels more like home

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Spirit World Trap   | Active   | Pull a targeted enemy fully into the spirit world for 6s; they are isolated from allies and fight only your spirit-world self in that time
  - Walking Between     | Active   | Rapidly alternate between physical and spirit planes 6 times in 3s, each crossing dealing spirit damage to all nearby enemies

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Spirit Lord         | Transform| Achieve mastery over the boundary between worlds for 20s; exist in both the physical and spirit worlds simultaneously, hitting enemies with both physical and spirit attacks on every strike, walking through all terrain freely, being visible to physical defenses at only 30% effectiveness since only part of you exists there, and upon return triggering a planar collapse that deals massive spirit damage to all enemies who were not in the spirit world when you re-merge the planes

################################################################################
CLASS 79: Witch (Hex/Curse/Familiar)
################################################################################
Fantasy: An ancient practitioner of traditional curse-work who layers hexes like paint, brews combat cauldrons that splash chaos across the battlefield, and fights alongside a bonded familiar whose power grows in perfect tandem with its witch. Old magic, patient magic, and utterly merciless magic.

ARCHETYPE A: Coven (Hex Stack, Curse Spread, Accumulate)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Applies and spreads stacking hexes that compound in power and spread between enemies like an infection of ill fortune.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Minor Hex           | Debuff   | Apply a Minor Hex to an enemy, reducing one random stat by 8% for 20s; hexes stack up to 5 times
  - Curse of Weakness   | Debuff   | Apply a Weakness Curse reducing the target's damage output by 10% for 15s
  - Coven Lore          | Passive  | Your hexes stack faster; enemies can accumulate stacks 20% faster and each stack is 10% more potent

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Spreading Hex       | Debuff   | Apply a hex that spreads to the nearest enemy when the target takes damage; the spread hex is at 50% potency
  - Hex Cluster         | Active   | Apply 3 minor hex stacks to all enemies in a 8m radius simultaneously
  - Compound Curse      | Passive  | Enemies with 3 or more hex stacks take 15% increased damage from all sources as the curses compound

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Major Hex           | Debuff   | Apply a Major Hex that reduces all of a target's stats by 15% for 20s; counts as 2 hex stacks
  - Viral Curse         | Debuff   | Apply a curse that spreads at full potency when the target dies, jumping to all enemies within 8m of the corpse
  - Coven Synchrony     | Active   | If an ally has also applied hexes to any target, synchronize; both sets of hexes are amplified by 30% for 15s

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Grand Hex           | Debuff   | Apply a comprehensive hex package simultaneously: damage reduction, healing reduction, attack speed reduction, and movement reduction, all at 20% for 20s
  - Hex Storm           | Active   | Release a storm of hexes in a 15m radius; apply 2 random hex stacks to every enemy in the area

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Great Curse     | Active   | Invoke the full power of the coven for 25s; all hexes on all enemies are immediately maxed to 5 stacks, all enemy stats are reduced by the maximum hex value, the Viral Curse is applied to every enemy simultaneously so deaths cascade into hex explosions, and your hex application rate doubles — creating a self-reinforcing curse spiral that worsens for enemies every time any of them takes an action

>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Cauldron (Brew, Potion, Splash Combat)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Maintains a bubbling combat cauldron, brewing potions mid-fight and flinging them as splash weapons at enemies or passing them to allies.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Quick Brew          | Active   | Rapidly brew a basic potion in 2s; effect depends on ingredients at hand (damage/heal/debuff)
  - Splash Vial         | Attack   | Hurl a brewed potion vial at an enemy; it shatters on impact dealing its effect to all in a 3m radius
  - Cauldron Sense      | Passive  | Identify all enemies' potion resistances and weaknesses; know which brews will be most effective before throwing

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Healing Tonic       | Heal     | Brew and throw a healing splash that heals all allies in a 4m radius for a moderate amount
  - Poison Brew         | Active   | Brew a potent poison potion; splashing it applies escalating poison damage over 15s to all hit
  - Overflow Cauldron   | Active   | Tip the cauldron slightly, releasing a wave of mixed brew in a 6m cone dealing random damage/healing effects to all caught

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Master Brew         | Active   | Take 4s to brew a master-quality potion with double the potency of basic brews in the chosen effect
  - Volatile Mix        | Active   | Deliberately mix an unstable brew; it explodes immediately for heavy AoE damage but deals minor damage to you as well
  - Cauldron Expertise  | Passive  | Reduce all brew times by 30%; master brews now take 2.5s and basic brews take 1.5s; potency of all brews increases by 15%

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Grand Cauldron      | Active   | Brew a multi-effect master potion that combines three brew types simultaneously; splash deals all three effects in the impact area
  - Potion Barrage      | Active   | Hurl 6 prepared vials in rapid sequence over 3s, each targeting the optimal enemy for its specific effect type

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Witch's Special | Active   | Brew the legendary witch's brew over 5s of channeling; release it as a massive cauldron splash in a 12m radius that applies every brewed effect simultaneously — enemies are damaged, poisoned, hexed, slowed, and weakened all at once, while allies are healed, buffed, and cleansed in the same splash; the potion's potency scales with the number of different brews used in the current encounter

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: Fights alongside an empowered familiar whose abilities and stats scale with the witch's own power level and whose actions can be synergized for devastating combined effects.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Summon Familiar     | Summon   | Summon your familiar (choose form once per encounter: cat, raven, or toad); it fights alongside you with basic stats
  - Familiar Strike     | Active   | Command your familiar to make an enhanced attack, dealing 150% of its normal damage
  - Witch's Bond        | Passive  | Your familiar shares 25% of your stat increases; as you grow stronger in combat, so does it

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Familiar Scout      | Active   | Send your familiar to scout; it reveals all enemies in a 20m radius and marks their positions for 15s
  - Combined Hex        | Active   | Your familiar delivers a hex while you cast simultaneously; the combined hex is 50% more potent than either alone
  - Empathic Link       | Passive  | When your familiar takes damage, you gain +5% damage as outrage; when you take damage, familiar gains +10% damage from protective instinct

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Familiar Evolution  | Active   | Allow your familiar to evolve into an enhanced form for 15s; it grows in size and gains a powerful new ability based on its chosen type
  - Soul Share          | Active   | Temporarily merge your senses with your familiar for 10s; you can see and act through both your own body and your familiar simultaneously
  - Familiar Sacrifice  | Active   | Dismiss the familiar in a blaze of bonded energy; deal damage equal to 40% of the familiar's remaining HP as a magical explosion, then resummon in 15s

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Twin Assault        | Active   | You and your familiar simultaneously attack the same target with perfectly coordinated strikes; combined damage equals 250% of individual attack value
  - Apex Familiar       | Active   | Trigger your familiar's apex evolution for 20s; it transforms into a powerful creature with triple its normal stats and gains independence to make its own tactical decisions

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - One Soul, Two Bodies | Transform| Achieve complete soul fusion with your familiar for 20s; you share one HP pool (combined total of both), act simultaneously every round (you each take a full action), all your bonuses apply to the familiar at 100% rather than 25%, all combined hex and attack skills are free-cast, and the familiar can use your spell abilities while you use its physical ones — when the fusion ends the familiar re-separates fully healed and immediately uses Apex form while you gain a 30s buff from the separation surge

################################################################################
CLASS 80: Ranger (Nature/Marksman)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A disciplined wilderness hunter who reads the land, sets the field, and
strikes from unseen distances — equally at home commanding beasts, springing
traps, or threading a needle-shot through a crowd.

ARCHETYPE A: Dead Eye (Precision / Scope / Headshot)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A patient marksman who builds measured aim to deliver single devastating
precision shots, rewarding stillness and careful target selection.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Steady Breath      | Passive   | Reduces projectile spread after standing still for 0.5s; stacks up to 3 times.
  - Mark Target        | Active    | Paint an enemy; your next shot against them deals +20% damage and reveals their health bar.
  - Flint Nock         | Attack    | A fast standard shot with no windup, establishing baseline ranged DPS.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Scope In           | Stance    | Toggle: slows movement by 40% but increases effective range and crit chance by 15%.
  - Vital Line         | Passive   | Shots that strike within 10 degrees of a marked weak point deal bonus armor-piercing damage.
  - Tungsten Tip       | Attack    | A single heavy shot that ignores 30% of armor; longer draw time required.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Headshot Protocol  | Passive   | Critical hits against the head stagger the target and apply a 0.5s interrupt, canceling channeled abilities.
  - Killzone           | Utility   | Designate a 6m radius area; all shots fired into it gain +25% damage for 8s.
  - Cold Calculation   | Buff      | After standing still for 2s, next shot is guaranteed critical and ignores dodge/evasion rolls.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Sniper's Patience  | Channel   | Hold to charge for up to 3s; release for a shot scaling 100-350% damage based on charge, piercing one enemy.
  - Ghost Bullet       | Attack    | A shot that passes through terrain once; deals full damage regardless of cover, with a 25s cooldown.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - One Shot, One Soul | Active    | After 1s of aim, fire a shot that executes enemies below 25% HP outright; above that threshold deals 600% weapon damage to a single target. 45s cooldown.

>> Your notes on DEAD EYE:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Trapper (Trap Placement / Zone Denial / Snare)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A calculating tactician who seeds the battlefield with hidden hazards,
forcing enemies into kill corridors and punishing any attempt to advance.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Snare Trap         | Utility   | Place a hidden root trap; triggers on enemy contact, rooting for 2s.
  - Tripwire           | Utility   | A wire that triggers an audible click and reveals the tripping enemy's position for 5s.
  - Bait Pile          | Utility   | Place a lure that pulls weak AI enemies toward it and distracts distracted players for 3s.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Spike Pit          | Active    | Dig a camouflaged 2x2m pit; enemies who step in are slowed 60% and take bleed damage per second.
  - Cluster Mine       | Utility   | A pressure mine that detonates into 5 smaller fragments on trigger, each dealing moderate damage in a small radius.
  - Marked Ground      | Passive   | Enemies that trigger any of your traps are marked for 6s; your attacks against marked enemies deal +15% damage.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Chain Reaction     | Passive   | When a trap triggers within 8m of another trap, the second trap also fires immediately.
  - Corrosive Net      | CC        | Launch a weighted net that ensnares the target, applying a stacking armor-reduction debuff every second while they struggle.
  - Prepared Ground    | Active      | Activate to instantly recall all placed traps, refund 50% of their cooldowns, and reset your trap limit counter.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Killbox Setup      | Active    | Place three linked traps simultaneously in a triangular formation; any enemy entering the triangle triggers all three at once.
  - Phantom Traps      | Passive   | All traps are now invisible until triggered; triggered traps leave a 2s lingering AoE that deals damage to nearby enemies.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - The Long Game      | Active    | Over 4s, seed the entire local area (30m radius) with 12 concealed micro-traps that persist for 60s; any enemy moving through the area triggers a cascading sequence. 90s cooldown.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A ranged fighter who fights in tandem with a bonded animal companion,

kite groups.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Bond Strike        | Attack    | Command your pet to attack the same target you are shooting; next shot deals +15% damage if pet struck that target this second.
  - Scout Hawk         | Summon    | Summon a hawk that flies ahead, revealing terrain and enemy positions in a 20m cone.
  - Pack Instinct      | Passive   | When your pet is within 5m of you, both you and the pet gain +10% attack speed.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Flanking Fang      | Active    | Direct your pet to circle behind the target; your next arrow deals +30% damage as the enemy is distracted.
  - Shared Senses      | Passive   | You gain your pet's scouting vision radius; your pet gains your marked-target awareness.
  - Heal Companion     | Heal      | Channel for 1.5s to restore 40% of your pet's max HP; reduces pet cooldown timers by 3s.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Arrow + Claw       | Active    | Simultaneously fire a shot and direct a pet lunge at the same target; both hits apply a stacking vulnerability debuff.
  - Alpha Call         | Buff      | Let out a rallying call; your pet grows 20% larger, gains bonus HP, and deals 40% more damage for 10s.
  - Scatter Drive      | Active    | Your pet herds enemies toward you while you volley shots into the cluster; applies a 2s slow to all enemies caught in between.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Primal Pact        | Toggle    | Enter a merged-senses state: your pet mirrors your movement direction and automatically attacks your attack target; both of you deal 20% more damage.
  - Wild Volley        | Channel   | Channel for 2s while your pet pins the target; release for a 5-arrow fan, each arrow homing slightly toward the pinned enemy.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Hunt as One        | Transform | For 15s, you and your pet share a single HP pool (combined), gain shared speed boosts, and every arrow fired summons a spectral duplicate of your pet that also attacks the target. On expiry, split HP is redistributed. 120s cooldown.

################################################################################
CLASS 81: Warlock (Dark Pact Caster)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A mortal who surrendered a piece of their soul for otherworldly power,
walking the razor's edge between their Patron's demands and their own ambition —
commanding alien tentacles, accumulating dread favor, and weaving curses that
compound into catastrophic doom.

ARCHETYPE A: Eldritch Horror (Tentacle / Aberration / Alien Spells)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A caster who summons fragments of something vast and unknowable,
deploying writhing tentacles and aberrant energy to overwhelm enemies with sheer
alien wrongness.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Void Lash          | Attack    | Conjure a whip-like tendril that strikes one enemy for moderate damage and briefly pulls them 2m closer.
  - Creeping Maw       | Summon    | Summon a small mouth on the ground that bites any enemy standing on it for 3s, dealing damage per second.
  - Aberrant Bolt      | Attack    | Fire a pulsing bolt of eldritch energy; on hit, causes the target to hear maddening whispers, applying a 1s confusion effect.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Tentacle Grasp     | CC        | A large tentacle erupts and grabs a target for 2.5s, rooting them in place while dealing damage per second.
  - Squirming Ward     | Reactive  | When struck, automatically spawn a defensive tentacle that retaliates against the attacker for 50% of the damage received.
  - Eye of the Deep    | Passive/Utility   | Summoned creatures gain +15% HP and +10% damage; hovering eyes orbit you, granting 360-degree vision.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Hungry Void        | Active    | Open a 3m-wide rift for 5s that slowly pulls all nearby enemies toward its center and deals damage per second.
  - Flesh Weave        | Summon    | Animate a multi-tentacled horror that attacks 3 enemies simultaneously and persists for 12s.
  - Gibbering Mass     | Summon    | Summon a shrieking mass that emits a 6m sanity aura; enemies in range suffer periodic random debuffs (slow, blind, or confuse).

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Rupture Reality    | Active    | Tear open a wound in space; all enemies in a 10m cone are hit by reality shards dealing heavy damage and are disoriented for 3s.
  - Many-Armed Embrace | Active    | Unleash 8 tentacles simultaneously that each seek out a different enemy within 15m, dealing damage and applying a 1s root per tentacle.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - That Which Waits   | Summon    | For 20s, partially manifest your Patron into the battlefield — a colossal form that attacks autonomously, applies area fear, and doubles the damage of all your tentacle/summon spells. On despawn, all nearby enemies take psychic damage equal to 10% of their max HP. 120s cooldown.

>> Your notes on ELDRITCH HORROR:
>>
>>

ARCHETYPE B: Patron's Gift (Favor Resource / Scaling Power / Pact Management)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A warlock who actively manages their relationship with their Patron,
spending and earning Favor to unlock escalating power spells — but risking Patron
wrath when overdrawn.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Tithe              | Passive   | Killing an enemy generates 5 Favor. Favor caps at 100 and decays by 2 per second out of combat.
  - Patron's Whisper   | Buff      | Spend 10 Favor to gain a 10s damage bonus of 15%. Cannot exceed the Favor cap.
  - Dark Offering      | Active    | Sacrifice 15% of your current HP to instantly generate 25 Favor.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Favor Surge        | Passive   | At 75+ Favor, all spells deal 10% more damage and have reduced cooldowns.
  - Pact Shield        | Reactive/Defense  | When struck below 30% HP, automatically spend 30 Favor to erect a barrier absorbing damage equal to 20% of your max HP.
  - Indebted Strike    | Attack    | Fire an empowered bolt that deals 150% damage; if Favor is below 20, you become Indebted (−20% spell damage) for 8s.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - The Price          | Passive   | Each time you spend 50 cumulative Favor, your next cast is free and doubled in power; Patron resets the counter with a visible warning flash.
  - Patronage Pulse    | Aura      | Emit a pulse spending 20 Favor; all allies within 10m gain a buff equal to half your current Favor as a % damage bonus for 6s.
  - Wrath Avoidance    | Utility   | Passively: if Favor hits 0, instead of Patron Wrath triggering, you gain a 3s immunity window. 30s internal cooldown.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Ascended Pact      | Toggle    | While active, all Favor generation is doubled but Favor decay triples; spells cost Favor instead of mana. Toggle off to revert.
  - Patron's Champion  | Active    | Spend 80 Favor to transform briefly: gain 50% damage reduction, 40% increased damage, and Favor recharges from all damage dealt for 12s.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Full Communion     | Active    | Spend all current Favor (minimum 50 required); for each 10 Favor spent, unleash one wave of devastating pact energy at a target. Maximum 10 waves at 100 Favor. Each wave deals massive damage and applies a random powerful debuff. 90s cooldown.

>>
>>

ARCHETYPE C: Hex Weaver (Curse Stacking / Debuff Combo / Hex Triggers)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A methodical debuffer who layers multiple hexes onto enemies, triggering
explosive synergies when curses interact — turning the enemy's own suffering into
cascading punishment.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Hex Mark           | Debuff    | Apply a basic hex to a target; stacks up to 5 times. Each stack reduces their damage by 3%.
  - Misfortune         | Debuff    | Curse an enemy so their next ability has a 40% chance to misfire, dealing 50% of its damage back to themselves.
  - Wither             | Debuff    | Reduce target's healing received by 50% for 8s. Reapplication refreshes duration.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Jinx Cascade       | Passive   | When a target has 3+ hex stacks, each new hex applied also deals 8% of their current HP as arcane damage.
  - Curse Weave        | Active    | Instantly apply 2 different hexes simultaneously to a target, triggering any stack-based bonuses.
  - Shared Misery      | Active    | Transfer all hex stacks from one enemy to a nearby enemy, plus deal damage to the original equal to 5% per stack transferred.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Hex Explosion      | Active    | Consume all hex stacks on a target to deal burst damage (10% max HP per stack); briefly silence the enemy.
  - Doom Brand         | Debuff    | A powerful hex that applies 1 stack per second automatically for 10s; stacks deal increasing damage per second.
  - Sympathetic Curse  | Passive   | When a hexed enemy dies, their hex stacks transfer at 50% value to the nearest enemy automatically.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Web of Woe         | Active    | Link up to 4 enemies in a curse network; damage dealt to one is shared (30%) to all others in the web for 12s.
  - Grand Hex          | Debuff    | Apply a master-level curse that cannot be cleansed, reduces all resistances by 25%, and doubles incoming hex stack gain for 15s.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Inevitable Doom    | Channel   | Channel for 2s, then trigger every hex on every hexed enemy simultaneously — each stack explodes for 15% of that enemy's max HP as raw damage. Enemies that die from this explosion curse all nearby foes with 3 stacks. 60s cooldown.

################################################################################
CLASS 82: Gravity Knight (Heavy Melee Sci-fi)
################################################################################
Fantasy: A warrior encased in graviton-field armor who bends the fundamental force
of mass to crush enemies, hurl objects across the battlefield, and warp the ground
itself into an inescapable well of annihilating gravity.

ARCHETYPE A: Dense Core (Gravity-Enhanced Strikes / Crushing Blows / Mass Amp)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A melee brawler who amplifies their own gravitational mass mid-swing,
turning each strike into a devastating compression event that breaks guards and
shatters defenses.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Mass Amp           | Buff      | Briefly increase your own gravitational field; next melee hit deals +25% damage and has a 100% knockdown chance.
  - Compression Strike | Attack    | A downward strike that compresses the impact zone; deals bonus damage based on enemy armor (armor is used against them).
  - Dense Footwork     | Passive/Resistance   | Your movement cannot be interrupted by knockback effects; you have +15% resistance to all displacement.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Gravity Slam       | Attack    | Leap and slam the ground with magnified mass; creates a 5m shockwave that staggers all nearby enemies.
  - Crushing Momentum  | Passive   | Each consecutive melee hit increases your damage by 5%, stacking to 25%. Resets on miss or 3s inactivity.
  - Field Collapse     | Active    | Instantly compress the gravity field on an enemy; deals damage equal to 8% of their max HP and temporarily halves their movement speed.

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Singularity Blow   | Attack    | A charged punch that forms a momentary micro-singularity on impact; enemy is dragged 3m toward you, stunned for 1.5s.
  - Iron Density       | Passive/Defense   | Your armor rating is increased by 20%; every 3 hits you receive empower your next melee attack to deal 30% bonus damage.
  - Weight of the World| Aura      | Emit a constant gravitational field in 4m radius; all enemies in range move 20% slower and suffer 5% more damage from your attacks.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Graviton Overload  | Active    | Temporarily spike your gravity field to maximum; all melee strikes for 10s deal area damage in a 3m radius and cannot be blocked or parried.
  - Critical Mass      | Passive   | At max Crushing Momentum stacks, your next attack is an unblockable detonation dealing 200% weapon damage in a 4m burst.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Collapse Point     | Channel   | Channel 2s to compress your entire gravitational mass into a single fist strike; upon impact, create a 10m implosion that pulls all enemies in range to the impact point, crushes them for massive damage, and leaves a lingering heavy-gravity zone for 8s where enemies move at 40% speed. 90s cooldown.

ARCHETYPE B: Mass Driver (Launch / Slam / Throw Attacks)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Identity: A kinetic combatant who uses gravitational propulsion to hurl enemies
and objects as weapons, treating the battlefield itself as an arsenal.

Tier 1 (Common)
  - Gravity Toss       | Active    | Grab and throw an enemy or object up to 12m; the thrown target deals damage to whatever it strikes.
  - Propulsion Dash    | Movement  | Use gravitational thrust to dash 6m in any direction, ignoring terrain elevation.
  - Uplift             | Active    | Launch a target directly upward 5m; they take fall damage on landing and are vulnerable for 2s.

Tier 2 (Uncommon)
  - Ricochet Hurl      | Attack    | Throw an enemy or debris that bounces between up to 3 targets before stopping, dealing damage to each.
  - Orbital Spin       | Active    | Grab a nearby enemy and spin them as a weapon in a 5m arc, damaging all enemies in the sweep before releasing.
  - Momentum Transfer  | Passive   | Enemies hit by thrown objects take 20% bonus damage from your next direct attack (momentum disruption).

Tier 3 (Rare)
  - Ground Pound       | Attack    | Leap up to 10m and slam down; impact radius scales with jump height. Minimum 3m radius, maximum 8m.
  - Wrecking Volley    | Active    | Simultaneously lift 3 loose objects or enemies and hurl them in a spread pattern.
  - Kinetic Rebound    | Reactive  | When an enemy is thrown by you and strikes a wall or terrain, they bounce back at you — catch (automatic) and rethrow for free within 1.5s.

Tier 4 (Epic)
  - Trajectory Master  | Passive   | All thrown objects and enemies travel 50% faster and deal 30% more impact damage; collateral damage radius increases by 2m.
  - Gravity Cannon     | Channel   | Channel 1.5s to build gravitational pressure, then release a focused beam that sends everything in a 3m wide, 20m long corridor flying backward 10m.

Tier 5 (Legendary)
  - Mass Ejection      | Active    | Instantly launch every enemy within 15m simultaneously outward at extreme velocity; each enemy becomes a projectile that damages whatever they collide with. Enemies that collide with each other deal bonus collision damage. 75s cooldown.
